Combat_Hark_MedUnique01_Boots.name: Syndicate Boots
Combat_Hark_MedUnique01_Boots.description: The Syndicate is a large offworld criminal organization that has never been able to get a foothold on Arrakis — due to the tireless efforts of Esmar Tuek and the smugglers to keep them out. Nobody knows why their mercenaries have begun to arrive in the Hagga Basin, nor what their interest is in the radiated wrecks of the Sheol. This Unique armor is designed to keep environmental hazards at bay.

Combat_Hark_MedUnique02_Boots.name: The Forge Boots
Combat_Hark_MedUnique02_Boots.description: Stock armor is made of hardened plasmeld. This Unique armor set is reinforced during the fabrication process - attaching minor heat dissipating components to every molecule within the plasmeld mass. This delivers increased heat resistance and a hard armor.

Combat_Nati_SandtroutLeathers01_Boots.name: Makeshift Shoes
Combat_Nati_SandtroutLeathers01_Boots.description: A crude pair of shoes made from plant fiber, used as a last resort by explorers.

Combat_Nati_ScavengerRags02_Boots.name: Scavenger Boots
Combat_Nati_ScavengerRags02_Boots.description: Threadbare apparel. Those scrounging for salvage in the open desert can often afford little else.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique01_Boo.name: Aren's Boots
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique01_Boo.description: Aren was a disgraced Kirab warlord who fled south to live amongst the scavengers. He developed this Unique scavenger armor - but it did not save him when the Kirab sent a squad south to eliminate him.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique02_Boo.name: Mendia's Boots
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique02_Boo.description: The story of the warlord Mendia is well known among the Kirab. How she escaped slavery in the north, abandoning her former life. How she gained a reputation for brutality by executing any slavers they captured. How she defeated their former leader, Aren, in a duel and drove him into hiding in the Southern Hagga Basin. This Unique armor is modelled after her own - reinforced to keep her enemies at bay.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique03_Boo.name: Inkvine Boots
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique03_Boo.description: Inkvine was a creeping plant native to Giedi Prime, used as a material by slavers for generations. Inkvine whips were the most common - particularly for the slow burning beet colored scars that they left on their victims. This Unique light armor is dyed to look almost like inkvine, despite being made from lesser materials.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique04_Boo.name: Quirth's Boots
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique04_Boo.description: Denira Quirth never intended to fight a war - she just wanted to survive it. When the Sandflies defected she swore not to shed the blood of her former colleagues - despite believing that the Sandflies cause was just. Her Unique armor is built to withstand the ordeals of Arrakis - but not the darts of her enemies.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique05_Boo.name: Chosen Boots
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique05_Boo.description: The Chosen are the elite warriors of the Maas Kharet cult, which makes its home at the old power station of Mysa Tarill. There are always four Chosen - Fire, Body, Tooth and Breath. Each is a symbolic part of the great sandworm, though this Unique armor is probably just something looted from the station.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique06_Boo.name: Pincushion Boots
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique06_Boo.description: This Unique armor set uses an experimental plasmeld layer to absorb dart impacts. In the earliest versions, the darts would stick in the gel-like outer layer, leaving the wearer bristling with darts like a pincushion. Though that flaw has been perfected, the name persists.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique01_Glo.name: Aren's Gloves
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique01_Glo.description: Aren was a disgraced Kirab warlord who fled south to live amongst the scavengers. He developed this Unique scavenger armor - but it did not save him when the Kirab sent a squad south to eliminate him.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique02_Glo.name: Mendia's Gauntlets
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique02_Glo.description: The story of the warlord Mendia is well known among the Kirab. How she escaped slavery in the north, abandoning her former life. How she gained a reputation for brutality by executing any slavers they captured. How she defeated their former leader, Aren, in a duel and drove him into hiding in the Southern Hagga Basin. This Unique armor is modelled after her own - reinforced to keep her enemies at bay.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique03_Glo.name: Inkvine Gauntlets
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique03_Glo.description: Inkvine was a creeping plant native to Giedi Prime, used as a material by slavers for generations. Inkvine whips were the most common - particularly for the slow burning beet colored scars that they left on their victims. This Unique light armor is dyed to look almost like inkvine, despite being made from lesser materials.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique04_Glo.name: Quirth's Gauntlets
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique04_Glo.description: Denira Quirth never intended to fight a war - she just wanted to survive it. When the Sandflies defected she swore not to shed the blood of her former colleagues - despite believing that the Sandflies cause was just. Her Unique armor is built to withstand the ordeals of Arrakis - but not the darts of her enemies.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique05_Glo.name: Chosen Gauntlets
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique05_Glo.description: The Chosen are the elite warriors of the Maas Kharet cult, which makes its home at the old power station of Mysa Tarill. There are always four Chosen - Fire, Body, Tooth and Breath. Each is a symbolic part of the great sandworm, though this Unique armor is probably just something looted from the station.

Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique06_Glo.name: Pincushion Gauntlets
Combat_Neut_SmugglerDeserterUnique06_Glo.description: This Unique armor set uses an experimental plasmeld layer to absorb dart impacts. In the earliest versions, the darts would stick in the gel-like outer layer, leaving the wearer bristling with darts like a pincushion. Though that flaw has been perfected, the name persists.

Combat_Choam_Light02_Helmet.name: Kirab Scout Helmet
Combat_Choam_Light02_Helmet.description: A lightly armored helmet made of iron, providing versatility in hydration and protection to Great House scouts.

Combat_Choam_Light03_Helmet.name: Slaver Scout Mask
Combat_Choam_Light03_Helmet.description: A lightly armored helmet made of steel, providing versatility in hydration and protection to Great House scouts.

Combat_Hark_MedUnique01_Helmet.name: Syndicate Helmet
Combat_Hark_MedUnique01_Helmet.description: The Syndicate is a large offworld criminal organization that has never been able to get a foothold on Arrakis — due to the tireless efforts of Esmar Tuek and the smugglers to keep them out. Nobody knows why their mercenaries have begun to arrive in the Hagga Basin, nor what their interest is in the radiated wrecks of the Sheol. This Unique armor is designed to keep environmental hazards at bay.

Combat_Hark_MedUnique02_Helmet.name: The Forge Helmet
Combat_Hark_MedUnique02_Helmet.description: Stock armor is made of hardened plasmeld. This Unique armor set is reinforced during the fabrication process - attaching minor heat dissipating components to every molecule within the plasmeld mass. This delivers increased heat resistance and a hard armor.

Combat_Hark_MedUnique02_Top.name: The Forge Chestpiece
Combat_Hark_MedUnique02_Top.description: Stock armor is made of hardened plasmeld. This Unique armor set is reinforced during the fabrication process - attaching minor heat dissipating components to every molecule within the plasmeld mass. This delivers increased heat resistance and a hard armor.

Combat_Light_Unique_BiomeHeat_Top_03.name: Skin-lined Jacket
Combat_Light_Unique_BiomeHeat_Top_03.description: When they were establishing their presence in the Hagga Basin, the Slavers noticed that their slaves were often dying of heatstroke. They could not have their stock dying, so they developed this Unique jacket to protect their slaves from the worst of the elements. Sometimes even the worst of people have good ideas. Just don't look too closely at the leather.

Combat_Light_Unique_BiomeHeat_Top_04.name: Miner's Blessing
Combat_Light_Unique_BiomeHeat_Top_04.description: Once in a while, there is a glitch in the gigantic entity that is CHOAM and the supply chains get crossed and something is sent to the place it was never meant to be. These Unique jackets, which arrived on Arrakis in very limited supply, are made of a much lighter material than the standard, which means they are cooler and more protective.

Combat_Light_Unique_BiomeHeat_Top_05.name: Station Garb
Combat_Light_Unique_BiomeHeat_Top_05.description: These Unique jackets were designed for the workers and guard from the Mysa Tarill power station. They are a cut above the usual supplies given out to pyons — probably because the power station was manned by a crew of highly trained engineers. Like the station, these jackets have mostly been long since abandoned.

Combat_Light_Unique_BiomeHeat_Top_06.name: Desert Garb
Combat_Light_Unique_BiomeHeat_Top_06.description: This Unique light chest armor is made with breathable material which allows House forces to better survive harsh desert climates.

Combat_Nati_SandtroutLeathers01_Top.name: Makeshift Jacket

Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique01_Boo.name: Oathbreaker Boots
Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique01_Boo.description: Amongst the Kirab there is a common expression "there is only the final oath". The Kirab know how close they are to the edge, to becoming what they despise, scavengers without friend or family, consigned to the southern reaches of Hagga Basin. This Unique armor is a remnant of those who have forsaken their final oath - their oath to the Kirab themselves.

Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique02_Boo.name: Karak's Boots
Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique02_Boo.description: Zaal Karak is a ruthless slavelord who runs his operation with an iron fist. This intimidating Unique heavy armor was commissioned as a present for him from the na-baron of the Harkonnen, Feyd-Rautha. It is Zaal Karak and his men who supply the bulk of slaves for the building of Neo-Carthag.

Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique03_Boo.name: Sentinel Boots
Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique03_Boo.description: Though the Sandflies have long since broken ties with the Miner's Guild, they still maintain the gear and traditions of their former life. These Unique boots are modified duneman boots - built for long hours in the mines.

Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique04_Boo.name: Acheronian Boots
Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique04_Boo.description: In ancient mythology, Acheron was said to be the entrance to hell. This Unique armor was retrieved from a shipwreck in the Sheol and became sought after due to its thick protective layer. Not that it helped those who died of radiation in the Sheol.

Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique05_Boo.name: Executor's Boots
Combat_Neut_AtreidesDeserterUnique05_Boo.description: This Unique armor is handed out to the legal representatives of CHOAM, such as lawyers and tax collectors. Unfortunately the bright orange CHOAM logo tends to make them more of a target, despite the reinforcement.

Combat_Heavy_Unique_Reinforced_Boots_05.name: Mendek's Boots
Combat_Heavy_Unique_Reinforced_Boots_05.description: General Mendek of the Harkonnen famously led a battlegroup during the Battle of Arrakeen that used old-world artillery to seal Atreides forces in shield wall caves. Mendek had this Unique armor conditioned as a reminder of the battle, sometimes wearing it to remind himself of what it must have felt like to be trapped in those caves, with no way to escape.

Combat_Heavy_Unique_Reinforced_Boots_06.name: Bulwark Boots
Combat_Heavy_Unique_Reinforced_Boots_06.description: This Unique heavy armor has internal layers of reinforced metal to protect House troops from blades and darts, however the bulk of this armor greatly increases stamina costs.

Combat_Light_Unique_Climbing_Gloves_06.name: Hook-claw Gloves
Combat_Light_Unique_Climbing_Gloves_06.description: These Unique light armor gloves assist House troops in climbing, making it less arduous and stamina draining.

Combat_Light_Unique_DewReap_Gloves_03.name: Reaper Gloves
Combat_Light_Unique_DewReap_Gloves_03.description: Treated with a small amount of huf-huf oil, these Unique gloves repel water and prevent any additional dew from escaping while harvesting.

Combat_Light_Unique_DewReap_Gloves_04.name: Improved Reaper Gloves
Combat_Light_Unique_DewReap_Gloves_04.description: Treated with a small amount of huf-huf oil, these Unique gloves repel water and prevent any additional dew from escaping while harvesting.

Combat_Light_Unique_DewReap_Gloves_05.name: Advanced Reaper Gloves
Combat_Light_Unique_DewReap_Gloves_05.description: Treated with a small amount of huf-huf oil, these Unique gloves repel water and prevent any additional dew from escaping while harvesting.

Combat_Light_Unique_DewReap_Gloves_06.name: Yueh's Reaper Gloves
Combat_Light_Unique_DewReap_Gloves_06.description: The treatment for these gloves was designed by the traitor, Dr Yueh. Originally he was searching for a way to repel blood from gloves during surgeries, but the applications of his water repellant treatment were wider than he imagined. Treated with a small amount of huf-huf oil, these Unique gloves repel water and prevent any additional dew from escaping while harvesting.

Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.name: Iri's Gauntlets
Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.description: Iri was a leader among the Kirab who became obsessed with finding a way to nullify the Holtzman effect. His tinkering led to the development of these Unique  gauntlets that use a feedback loop to decrease power usage. Iri himself claimed that the gauntlets "spoke" to him and his state of mind deteriorated greatly until he threw himself from a cliff.

Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.name: Shock Gauntlets
Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.description: These Unique gauntlets used to be attached to uncooperative slaves - shocking their palms as a punishment. One supervisor noticed that slaves equipped with the gauntlets needed to recharge their tools and power packs less frequently. The gauntlets were quickly modified to a low level current and given to all workers. Even slavers value efficiency.

Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.name: Power Gauntlets
Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.description: These Unique gauntlets were developed to help fatigued miners keep going when their tools were running low. Containing a series of capacitors within them, they help to even out the power flow and increase efficiency. The Sandflies have co-opted these gauntlets for use in their own operations.

Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.name: Station Gauntlets
Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.description: These Unique gauntlets were developed for use on the power station at Mysa Tarill. After the incident with the sandworm, the station was abandoned and boxes of these gauntlets were left lying around to be scavenged by those brave or foolish enough to approach the worm.

Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.name: Circuit Gauntlets
Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerEfficient_Glove.description: A Unique heavy armor gauntlet that recon squads use to optimize power usage on connected Power Packs.

Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerIncrease_Top_06.name: Power Harness
Combat_Heavy_Unique_PowerIncrease_Top_06.description: This Unique heavy chest armor comes with additional power reserves to assist House forces in mining and suspensor usage.

Combat_Light_Unique_Scanning_Helmet_05.name: Wayfinder Helm
Combat_Light_Unique_Scanning_Helmet_05.description: The electronics in this Unique helmet connect to hand-held scanners, boosting their scanning range.

Combat_Light_Unique_Scanning_Helmet_06.name: Wayfinder Helm
Combat_Light_Unique_Scanning_Helmet_06.description: The electronics in this Unique helmet connect to hand-held scanners, boosting their scanning range.

Combat_Light_Unique_Stamina_Bottom_04.name: Compression-Stim Leggings
Combat_Light_Unique_Stamina_Bottom_04.description: These Unique light leggings are equipped with a compression triggered mechanism which stimulates the leg muscles, reducing the stamina drain of dashing.

Combat_Light_Unique_Stamina_Bottom_05.name: Stim-Leggings
Combat_Light_Unique_Stamina_Bottom_05.description: These Unique light leggings are equipped with a compression triggered mechanism which stimulates the leg muscles, reducing the stamina drain of dashing.

Combat_Light_Unique_Stamina_Bottom_06.name: Ix-core Leggings

Stillsuit_Choam_Unique_Dashed02_Top.name: Desert Dasher Garment
Stillsuit_Choam_Unique_Dashed02_Top.description: Veteran Dune Men know the value of being able to run just a little bit faster and further than the next guy when danger threatens. Those who can afford the extra cost often invest in this Unique upgraded stillsuit fashioned from lightweight materials.

Stillsuit_Unique_Efficient_04_Boots.name: Maraqeb Stillsuit Boots
Stillsuit_Unique_Efficient_04_Boots.description: Maraqeb, known colloquially as The Sentinel, is a rock formation that has weathered thousands of years of sandstorms. The Fremen believed it was a holy site, a place that rewards endurance. This Unique stillsuit is based on the principles of Maraqeb - durability and efficiency.

Stillsuit_Unique_Efficient_05_Boots.name: Batigh Stillsuit Boots
Stillsuit_Unique_Efficient_05_Boots.description: A stillsuit manufacturer from Carthag once visited Kynes the Planetologist to enlist his aid in designing a better stillsuit. This Unique stillsuit was the result, and Kynes insisted that the manufacturer name it the Batigh, which the manufacturer proudly did.

MTX_Stillsuit_Smuggler_Boots.name: Smuggler’s Stillsuit Boots
MTX_Stillsuit_Smuggler_Boots.description: Long Description: In the scorched harshness of Arrakis, a smuggler does not get far in their entrepreneurial dealings without gear that is not practical, mobile, and includes a uncompromised stillsuit.

Stillsuit_Unique_Efficient_06_Boots.name: Villari's Stillsuit Boots
Stillsuit_Unique_Efficient_06_Boots.description: After his ordeal in the Deep Desert, Keif Villari became an overnight hero to the members of the Miner's Guild. Cashing in on his fame, this Unique stillsuit is branded by CHOAM as 'the stillsuit to wear when you're stuck in the desert for forty days'. Villari receives a small royalty for each stillsuit purchased.

Stillsuit_Unique_HeatMitigation_04_Mask.name: Shadow Hood
Stillsuit_Unique_HeatMitigation_04_Mask.description: This Unique hood is designed to reduce the harm caused by direct sunlight. It has been soaked in the juice of the creosote bush - inhibiting sweating and reducing heat buildup.

Stillsuit_Unique_HeatMitigation_05_Mask.name: Shaded Hood
Stillsuit_Unique_HeatMitigation_05_Mask.description: This Unique hood is designed to reduce the harm caused by direct sunlight. It has been soaked in the juice of the creosote bush - inhibiting sweating and reducing heat buildup.

Stillsuit_Unique_HeatMitigation_06_Mask.name: Pardot's Hood
Stillsuit_Unique_HeatMitigation_06_Mask.description: This Unique hood is designed to reduce the harm caused by direct sunlight. The famous planetologist, Pardot Kynes, designed this hood for Fremen workers who were helping with his experiments. It has been soaked in the juice of the creosote bush - inhibiting sweating and reducing heat buildup.

Combat_Light_Unique_ReduceSuspensor_Top_.name: Rigged Suspensor Jacket
Combat_Light_Unique_ReduceSuspensor_Top_.description: Used primarily by those who are called to spend long hours doing heavy activity while using suspensor belts, this Unique  jacket features a series of specially designed capacitors to optimize the flow of energy through battery pack and suspensor belt.

Combat_Light_Unique_ReduceSuspensor_Top_.name: Improved Suspensor Jacket
Combat_Light_Unique_ReduceSuspensor_Top_.description: Used primarily by those who are called to spend long hours doing heavy activity while using suspensor belts, this Unique jacket features a series of specially designed capacitors to optimize the flow of energy through battery pack and suspensor belt.

Combat_Light_Unique_ReduceSuspensor_Top_.name: Advanced Suspensor Jacket

Combat_Light_Unique_ReduceSuspensor_Top_.name: Idaho's Charge
Combat_Light_Unique_ReduceSuspensor_Top_.description: This jacket was jury-rigged by Duncan Idaho to improve his suspensor power during aerial combat bouts. His famous knee charge relies on suspensors to give him additional range. This Unique jacket features a series of specially designed capacitors to optimize the flow of energy through battery pack and suspensor belt.

Combat_Light_Unique_BeneGeserit_Boots.name: Boots of the Sisterhood
Combat_Light_Unique_BeneGeserit_Boots.description: When one of the Sisterhood raises her hand in violence, the enemy is rarely able to register the motion. This pair of unique Bene Gesserit boots is awarded to those who undertake advanced Bene Gesserit training.

Combat_Light_Unique_BeneGeserit_Gloves.name: Gloves of the Sisterhood

Combat_Light_Unique_Mentat_Boots.name: Reinforced Boots of the Mentat
Combat_Light_Unique_Mentat_Boots.description: In the subtle battleground of tactical intrigue, a set of light armor can mean the difference between a punctured vital organ and a survivable scar.

MTX_D_Combat_Light_Smuggler_Boots.name: Smuggler’s Agile Assault Boots
MTX_D_Combat_Light_Smuggler_Boots.description: On Arrakis, smugglers navigate a treacherous web in the underworld, where allies can become enemies and enemies allies. It pays to be agile. One must be just a hair faster than one’s opponent. Protection that offers the least encumbrance becomes attractive to smugglers who follow this philosophy.

Stillsuit_Unique_Planetologist_Boots.name: Planetologist Light Armor Boots
Stillsuit_Unique_Planetologist_Boots.description: Though the interests of a Planetologist are largely academic, their path to knowledge can lead them into physical danger. This light-weight armor offers some protection while aiding the Planetologist in their specialized pursuits.

Combat_Heavy_Unique_Swordmaster_Boots.description: The Swordmasters of Ginaz have a legendary reputation, and they often live up to it.

MTX_D_Combat_Heavy_Smuggler_Boots.description: Some smugglers prefer a steady approach and heavier protection. They are fond of saying, “Move slowly and the day of your revenge will come, for speed is a device of Shaitan.”

Combat_Heavy_Unique_Trooper_Boots.description: It is said that House Troopers train in their heavy armor so thoroughly and come to know the heft and weight so intimately, that they feel awkward moving around while clothed in mere fatigues or civilian garments.

Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_02.name: Softstep Boots
Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_02.description: Found abandoned throughout the former territories of the Fremen, these Unique boots are made of a strange type of soft leather. Each step in these boots seems to melt into the sand, reducing the vibrations that attract the worm.

Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_03.name: Ta'lab Softstep Boots
Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_03.description: Found abandoned throughout the former territories of the Fremen, these Unique boots are made of a strange type of soft leather. Each step in these boots seems to melt into the sand, reducing the vibrations that attract the worm. This particular set is based on a design found in the long-abandoned Sietch Ta'lab.

Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_04.name: Idaho Softstep Boots
Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_04.description: A small mechanism in the sole of these Unique light armor boots emits an irregular vibration that reduces the amount of worm-attention generated by footsteps on the open sands.

Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_05.name: Tarl Softstep Boots
Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_05.description: These Unique boots were taken from the rubble of Sietch Tarl after it was destroyed by the Sardaukar. Sietch Tarl was the place where Liet-Kynes made a final stand against the Sardaukar, collapsing the walls and killing dozens of them in a desperate final stand. Perhaps Liet-Kynes wore these same boots on that fateful day.

Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_06.name: Tabr Softstep Boots
Combat_Light_Unique_WormThreat_Boots_06.description: Found abandoned throughout the former territories of the Fremen, these Unique boots are made of a strange type of soft leather. Each step in these boots seems to melt into the sand, reducing the vibrations that attract the worm. Sietch Tabr was one of the Fremen sietches that put up little to no resistance during the pogrom, instead melting away quietly.

Combat_Light_SpiceMask.name: Spice Mask
Combat_Light_SpiceMask.description: A mask with a filtration system that prevents the wearer from inhaling airborne spice particles. Dunemen utilize this to avoid adverse addictive effects while working the spice fields.

Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_01_Boots.name: Hollower Stillsuit Boots
Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_01_Boots.description: The Hollower Clan is an inbred family of scavengers who inhabit the Hollow Arches of Southern Hagga Basin. This Unique stillsuit was their invention - though rumor persists that it was a gift from Fremen that they hid during the Sardaukar pogrom.

Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_01_Gloves.name: Hollower Stillsuit Gloves
Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_01_Gloves.description: The Hollower Clan is an inbred family of scavengers who inhabit the Hollow Arches of Southern Hagga Basin. This Unique stillsuit was their invention - though rumor persists that it was a gift from Fremen that they hid during the Sardaukar pogrom.

Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_02_Boots.name: Menol's Stillsuit Boots
Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_02_Boots.description: Menol was well loved among the Kirab, known far and wide for his spice beer brewing operations. He accidentally discovered that soaking his stillsuit leathers led to a stiffer, more protective Unique garment. Like his spice beer, he shared this knowledge freely, didn't help him much when he was  stabbed to death by a drunk Kirab who hallucinated he was a sandworm.

Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_03_Boots.name: Kel's Stillsuit Boots
Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_03_Boots.description: Kel is the most paranoid of the slavelords who came to Arrakis to help with the building of Neo-Carthag. He was a nervous businessman, even before he splintered with the rest of the slavers and moved his operations across the rift. Now he sleeps in this Unique stillsuit he designed. He does not sleep well at night.

Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_04_Boots.name: Shadrath's Stillsuit Boots
Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_04_Boots.description: Shadrath was a Fremen warrior, who killed dozens of Sardaukar in razzia across the Shield Wall. When he was gravely wounded, he returned to a hidden cave and sealed himself in a deathstill, preserving his water for his tribe. This Unique armored stillsuit is based on the design of the one found abandoned by the deathstill.

Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_05_Boots.description: The Saturnine were a group of merc-assassins who came to Arrakis during the Fremen pogrom. The Saturnine pride themselves on hunting dangerous individuals and converting them into trophies. The Saturnine claim that this Unique stillsuit bears the visage of Stilgar, a famous Fremen naib.

Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_06_Boots.name: Imperial Stillsuit Boots
Stillsuit_Unique_Armored_06_Boots.description: This Unique stillsuit was designed by the finest tailors CHOAM has access to, and every detail has been considered for the comfort and cut. It is also highly armored, which makes it useful in combat. But regardless, the Imperium has never quite managed to replicate the elegant simplicity of Fremen technology.

Stillsuit_Unique_HighCapacity_06_Top.name: Shaddam's Bladder
Stillsuit_Unique_HighCapacity_06_Top.description: This Unique stillsuit design was originally an extension to the Imperial stillsuit and was manufactured by sycophant in the case of a visit from the Emperor himself. With extra large thighpads and catchpockets, this stillsuit lets the wearer go for days without needing to use a toilet, something which has become a source of much amusement.

Social_Neut_ImperialCasual_Top.name: Imperial Casual Top
Social_Neut_ImperialCasual_Top.description: Casual clothing in an Imperial style.

Social_Neut_ImperialCasual_Boots.name: Imperial Casual Shoes
Social_Neut_ImperialCasual_Boots.description: Casual shoes in an Imperial style.

Stillsuit_Choam_Unique_Dashed05_Top.name: Dune Dancer Stillsuit Garment
Stillsuit_Choam_Unique_Dashed05_Top.description: Veteran Dune Men know the value of being able to run just a little bit faster and further than the next guy when danger threatens. Those who can afford the extra cost often invest in this Unique upgraded stillsuit fashioned from lightweight materials.

Stillsuit_Choam_Unique_Dashed06_Top.name: Crew Chief’s Stillsuit Garment
Stillsuit_Choam_Unique_Dashed06_Top.description: It takes years of hard work to reach the rank of Guild Crew Chief. Most chiefs are well into their later years when they earn their promotion, and the wear and tear of a lifetime spent spice harvesting has taken its toll on their bodies. Investing in one of these Unique ultralight stillsuits is one way to make getting through a twelve hour shift a bit easier. Even those who are still strong and vigorous will benefit from wearing such a suit, as it significantly reduces the stamina cost of dashing.

Radiation_Suit_T6_Unique_Armored.name: Tactical Radiation Suit
Radiation_Suit_T6_Unique_Armored.description: It is difficult enough to keep out leaks and maintain the integrity of a radiation suit under normal circumstances, let alone in the chaos of combat. This unique suit is reinforced with armor and higher radiation mitigation for those unfortunate souls who find themselves fighting in an irradiated hellscape.

Social_Atre_Casual03_Unique_Story_TheBlo.name: Arrakeen Palace Servant’s Tunic
Social_Atre_Casual03_Unique_Story_TheBlo.description:
Equipping this item will override your chosen Homeworld with Caladan, giving you access to [HONORABLE] dialogue options.

This tunic is part of the uniform worn by palace servants in Arrakeen. Sometimes there is opportunity in looking like one of the help.

Exoskeleton_Heavy06_Unique_Top.name: Combat Exoskeleton Chestpiece
Exoskeleton_Heavy06_Unique_Top.description:
In addition to its base stats, this Unique heavy armor grants +10% melee damage to the wearer.

This advanced armor comes with a muscle memory tech system. It learns the motions of the wearer and exaggerates them, for more powerful attacks.

Assassin_Light06_Unique_Helmet.name: Phantom Whisper Helm
Assassin_Light06_Unique_Helmet.description:
In addition to its base stats, this Unique headpiece grants a 5% detection speed reduction.

A protracted, never-ending War of Assassins makes a fertile ground for those who slay by stealth. The Phantom Whisper Tech employed in armor and garments, to dampen sound while moving, is the brainchild of Ixian inventors who saw a tremendous uptick in their wealth with the conflict on Arrakis.

MTX_Combat_Heavy_Watershippers_Boots.name: Tharnox Operations Boots
MTX_Combat_Heavy_Watershippers_Boots.description:
Reinforced boots built for extreme cold and sustained enforcement for Water Shipper fighters.

The Tharnox takes its name from the six-limbed predator native to the ice world Lankiveil, known for its mass and ability to move through deep ice without losing momentum. This suit reflects those qualities, it is layered, insulated, and reinforced for prolonged engagements where resistance is expected.

MTX_Stillsuit_Watershippers_Boots.name: Polar Operations Stillsuit Boots
MTX_Stillsuit_Watershippers_Boots.description:
Stillsuit boots adapted for polar operations. 

Equipment issued for the extreme conditions of the polar cap, where durability takes precedence over efficiency, and built to endure and remain serviceable regardless of operator fatigue or loss. It is not intended to conceal the wearer—only to ensure they continue working.

MTX_Combat_Assault_Watershippers_Boots.description:
Combat boots built for mobility and sustained patrol.

The Ranger suit is built for mobility and endurance, allowing rapid movement without sacrificing control. Units equipped with this gear are commonly referred to as “Rangers,” and are often the first and last warning before heavier forces arrive.

The Ranger suit is built for mobility and endurance, allowing rapid movement without sacrificing control. Units equipped with this gear are commonly referred to as “Rangers,” and are often the first and last warning before heavier forces arrive.

MTX_Combat_Assault_Watershippers_Bottom.name: Ranger Operations Trousers
MTX_Combat_Assault_Watershippers_Bottom.description:
Combat trousers built for mobility and sustained patrol.

The Ranger suit is built for mobility and endurance, allowing rapid movement without sacrificing control. Units equipped with this gear are commonly referred to as “Rangers,” and are often the first and last warning before heavier forces arrive.

Literjon.name: Literjon
Literjon.description: Use to drink its contents sip by sip. A Fremen item that can store water collected with a Dew Reaper or that has been transferred from other sources.

HealthPack_Channeled.name: Healkit
HealthPack_Channeled.description: A standardized pack of cleansing agents, dermastraps and chemical stimulants, widely used to keep injured troops on their feet and in the fight.

SpiceAddictionConsumable_01.name: Melange Spiced Food
SpiceAddictionConsumable_01.description: The spice melange extends life, expands consciousness and allows the mysterious navigators of the spacing guild to guide heighliners safely between the stars. This food is seasoned with spice melange and will raise the amount of spice in your blood.

SpiceAddictionConsumable_02.name: Melange Spiced Beer
SpiceAddictionConsumable_02.description: The spice melange extends life, expands consciousness and allows the mysterious navigators of the spacing guild to guide heighliners safely between the stars. This food is seasoned with spice melange and will raise the amount of spice in your blood.

SpiceAddictionConsumable_03.name: Melange Spiced Coffee
SpiceAddictionConsumable_03.description: The spice melange extends life, expands consciousness and allows the mysterious navigators of the spacing guild to guide heighliners safely between the stars. This food is seasoned with spice melange and will raise the amount of spice in your blood.

SpiceAddictionConsumable_04.name: Melange Spiced Wine
SpiceAddictionConsumable_04.description: The spice melange extends life, expands consciousness and allows the mysterious navigators of the spacing guild to guide heighliners safely between the stars. This food is seasoned with spice melange and will raise the amount of spice in your blood.

HighCapacityLiterjon.name: Hajra Literjon Mk1
HighCapacityLiterjon.description: A Unique lightweight water container created by the Fremen for those going on a journey of seeking. Often carried by wali on their trial of aql, the contents were donated from the entire sietch as a sacrifice for good luck. Stores more water than ordinary literjons, and takes up less space.

Bloodsack_01.name: Small Blood Sack
Bloodsack_01.description: An item that can store blood collected with a Blood Extraction Tool. Deposit in a Blood Purifier to make drinkable water. Can be drunk directly to rehydrate, but max health will suffer.

Decajon.name: Decaliterjon
Decajon.description: A Fremen item that can store water collected with a Dew Reaper or that has been transferred from other sources. Popularized by Dew Farmers due to its large capacity, but it's large size makes it difficult to carry arround.

HealthPack_Channeled_3.name: Healkit Mk4
HealthPack_Channeled_3.description: An advanced pack of cleansing agents, dermastraps and chemical stimulants, widely used to keep injured troops on their feet and in the fight.

Bloodsack_02.description: An item that can store blood collected with a Blood Extraction Tool. Deposit in a Blood Purifier to make drinkable water. Can be drunk directly to rehydrate, but max health will suffer.

Bloodsack_03.description: An item that can store blood collected with a Blood Extraction Tool. Deposit in a Blood Purifier to make drinkable water. Can be drunk directly to rehydrate, but max health will suffer.

Mouse_Corpse.name: Mouse Corpse
Mouse_Corpse.description: A dead Muad'dib. Can be consumed to drink some blood as a last resort.

SpiceAddictionConsumable_T6.description: The spice melange extends life, expands consciousness and allows the mysterious navigators of the spacing guild to guide heighliners safely between the stars. This food is seasoned with spice melange and will raise the amount of spice in your blood.

HealthPack_Channeled_4.description: An exceptional pack of cleansing agents, dermastraps and chemical stimulants, widely used to keep injured troops on their feet and in the fight.

HighCapacityLiterjon_02.description: A Unique lightweight water container created by the Fremen for those going on a journey of seeking. HighCapacityLiterjon_05.description: A Unique lightweight water container created by the Fremen for those going on a journey of seeking. HighCapacityLiterjon_06.description: A Unique lightweight water container created by the Fremen for those going on a journey of seeking. Often carried by wali on their trial of aql, the contents were donated from the entire sietch as a sacrifice for good luck. Stores more water than ordinary literjons, and takes up less space.

Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_02.name: Scipio's Bloodbag
Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_02.description: Scipio was a Kirab Warlord who took over the Wreck of the Pallas when it fell during the War of Assassins. Over time, Scipio became known for his brutal torture of those who trespassed on his territory. He would extract most of the blood from their bodies, then abandon them near the leaking radiation core by the engines of the Pallas. This Uniqueblood bag is able to tolerate large amounts of reuse - a reminder of its twisted legacy.

Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_03.name: Glutton's Bloodbag
Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_03.description: A whisper and a rumor, even among the slaver's themselves is the Slavelord known as the Glutton. His origins are clouded in mystery, but he has carved himself a space within the cutthroat world of the slavers - literally. His wake is littered with corpses and it is rumored that the Glutton is a cannibal. This Unique bloodbag was apparently designed by him, but to what end, even the Slavers don't seem to know.

Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_04.name: Sinner's Bloodbag
Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_04.description: This Unique bloodbag was symbolically named for the blood that the Sandflies shed when they rebelled against the Miner's Guild. Though the gesture is symbolic, the practicality of the blood bag is not.

Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_05.name: Maas Kharet Bloodbag
Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_05.description: This Unique bloodbag is used by the Mass Kharet to gather large quantities of water for sacrifice to Shai-Hulud. Though others view the cults habits as wasteful, their leader knows that sacrificing something as precious as water is a mark of power.

Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_06.name: The Baron's Bloodbag
Bloodsack_Unique_Durable_06.description: This Unique bloodbag is named for the Baron Harkonnen. During one of his infrequent visits to Arrakis, he had a group of Fremen sacrificed in Carthag, and then hung bags full of their blood in public places throughout the city - daring others to come and try to reclaim their water.

Thumper.name: Thumper
Thumper.description: Placing this Fremen device in the open desert will cause vibrations that will summon any nearby sandworm.

UniqueThumper.name: Clapper Mk4
UniqueThumper.description: Modified to follow the Fremen design, this Unique thumper generates a large amount of threat with the sandworm in a short amount of time. Just be sure to place it on open sand.

AluminiumBar.name: Aluminum Ingot
AluminiumBar.description: An Aluminum ingot, refined from Aluminum Ore at a Medium Ore Refinery. Used to create products that require Aluminum. Can also be further processed into Duraluminum with Jasmium Crystals.

AzuriteOre.name: Copper Ore
AzuriteOre.description: Copper ore, mined from a Copper deposit. Can be refined into Copper Ingots at any Ore Refinery to create new products that require it.

BauxiteOre.name: Aluminum Ore
BauxiteOre.description: Aluminum ore, mined from an Aluminum deposit. Can be refined into Aluminum Ingots at a Medium Ore Refinery to create new products that require it.

CopperBar.name: Copper Ingot
CopperBar.description: A Copper ingot, refined from Copper Ore at any Ore Refinery. Used to create products that require Copper.

DolomiteRock.name: Carbon Ore
DolomiteRock.description: Carbon ore, mined from a Carbon deposit. Can be processed with Iron Ingots together to create refined Steel Ingots at any Ore Refinery to create new products that require it.

FlourSand.name: Flour Sand
FlourSand.description: Found in flour sand drifts on the open sands, predominantly in the Vermillius Gap. Can be harvested by hand or with a Static Compactor. Can be refined into Silicone Blocks in a Chemical Refinery.

FuelCanister.name: Small Vehicle Fuel Cell
FuelCanister.description: Vehicle Fuel Cell with low capacity. Refined from Fuel Cells at a Chemical Refinery. Used to power vehicles.

IronBar.name: Iron Ingot
IronBar.description: An Iron ingot, refined from Iron Ore at any Ore Refinery. Used to create products that require Iron. Can also be further processed into Steel with Carbon Ore.

FuelCanister_Medium.name: Medium Sized Vehicle Fuel Cell
FuelCanister_Medium.description: Vehicle Fuel Cell with average capacity. Refined from Fuel Cells at a Chemical Refinery. Used to power vehicles.

FuelCanister_Large.name: Large Vehicle Fuel Cell
FuelCanister_Large.description: Vehicle Fuel Cell with high capacity. Refined from Fuel Cells at a Chemical Refinery. Used to power vehicles.

MagnetiteOre.name: Iron Ore
MagnetiteOre.description: Iron ore, mined from an Iron deposit. Can be refined into Iron Ingots at any Ore Refinery to create new products that require it.

PlantFiber.name: Plant Fiber
PlantFiber.description: Resource that can be picked everywhere in the world where there is solid land for it to take root. Woven to fibers used in armor and bandages.

ScrapMetal.name: Salvaged Metal
ScrapMetal.description: This metal has been salvaged from wreckage left on Arrakis. Can be recovered with a Cutteray. Used for crafting rudimentary metal items.

Silicone.name: Silicone Block
Silicone.description: A block of plastic refined from Flour Sand in a Chemical Refinery. Can be used to create new products that require it.

MelangeSpice.name: Spice Melange
MelangeSpice.description: Made from Spice Sand at a Spice Refinery. The most sought-after resource in the universe. Enables intergalactic travel and extends life. Addictive. Withdrawal leads to death.

SpiceSand.name: Spice Sand
SpiceSand.description: Can be harvested by hand or with a Static Compactor at Spice Blow sites before the Worm arrives. Can be refined into valuable Spice Melange at a Spice Refinery.

Stone.name: Granite Stone
Stone.description: Stronger than the sandstones that crumble in the storms that sweep across Arrakis, granite stone is widely used a basic building material. It is found almost everywhere there is dirt.

WeldingMaterial.name: Welding Wire
WeldingMaterial.description: Welding material is required when using the welding torch to repair vehicle parts. Crafted from salvaged metal parts.

JasmiumCrystal.name: Jasmium Crystal
JasmiumCrystal.description: Jasmium Crystal, mined from a Jasmium deposit. Can be refined together with Aluminum Ingots into Duraluminum Ingots at a Medium Ore Refinery to create new products that require it.

Basalt.name: Basalt Stone
Basalt.description: Stone which can be refined for usage in construction.

SteelBar.name: Steel Ingot
SteelBar.description: A Steel ingot refined from Carbon Ore and Iron Ingot at any Ore Refinery. Used to create products that require Steel.

DuraluminumRod.name: Duraluminum Ingot
DuraluminumRod.description: A Duraluminum ingot, refined from Aluminum Ingots and Jasmium Crystals at a Medium Ore Refinery. Used to create products that require Duraluminum.

ErythriteCrystal.name: Erythrite Crystal
ErythriteCrystal.description: Erythrite Crystal, mined from an Erythrite deposit in the Hagga Rift. Can be refined into Cobalt Paste at a Chemical Refinery to create new products that require it.

CobaltBar.name: Cobalt Paste
CobaltBar.description: A dissolution of Cobalt, refined from Erythrite Crystal from the Hagga Rift at a Chemical Refinery. Used to create products that require Cobalt.

SpiceResidue.name: Spice Residue
SpiceResidue.description: Residue left from spice refining, useful in crafting.

SaguaroResourceRaw.name: Agave Seeds
SaguaroResourceRaw.description: In common with its distant ancestors, the fruits of the Arrakeen Agave contain a large mass of seeds, which are put to many uses by those who have ready access to them.

FremenComponent1.name: EMF Generator
FremenComponent1.description: A fabrication component found in Fremen areas, such as caves. Used in Cutterays.

FremenComponent2.name: Micro-sandwich Fabric
FremenComponent2.description: The Micro-Sandwich Fabric is a shorthand for the multi-layered water recycling component used in Fremen equipment such as stillsuits. Look for these in caves.

OldImperialComponent1.name: Advanced Servoks
OldImperialComponent1.description: A fabrication component used in vehicles such as Sandbikes. Found in Old Imperial remnants, such as Imperial Testing Stations.

OldImperialComponent2.name: Particle Capacitor
OldImperialComponent2.description: A fabrication component found in Old Imperial remnants, such as Imperial Testing Stations. Used in Holtzman tech or special constructions, such as Boost modules for vehicles.

GreatHouseComponent1.name: Plasteel Microflora Fiber
GreatHouseComponent1.description: A fabrication component used in armor. Found in Great House ruins, such as Shipwrecks.

GreatHouseComponent2.name: Mechanical Parts
GreatHouseComponent2.description: A fabrication component used in firearms. Found in Great House ruins, such as Shipwrecks.

Corpse.name: Corpse
Corpse.description: Dead body that can be processed into water using a Deathstill.

Plastone.name: Plastone
Plastone.description: An artificial composite of Silicone and Basalt used in sandstorm-resistant construction.

T6ResourceA.name: Titanium Ore
T6ResourceA.description: Titanium ore is found in the deep desert, and most commonly utilized in the production of plastanium, an alloy of titanium and stravidium.

T6ResourceB.name: Stravidium Mass
T6ResourceB.description: Raw stravidium mass can be found in the deep desert, and refined into fibers.

T2HeavyComponent.name: Armor Plating
T2HeavyComponent.description: Strengthened plating can be liberated from those who make use of them in their heavy armor, and repurposed to other ends.

T1RusherComponent.name: Blade Parts
T1RusherComponent.description: Even the wide variety of melee weapons tend to use standardized parts for their handful of complex elements. These can often be found on the bodies of those who favor the blade, or in their storage lockers

T1AssaultComponent.name: Gun Parts
T1AssaultComponent.description: Key components for a wide variety of standard ranged weapons, often salvaged from the bodies of those who no longer have need for them.

T3MarksmanComponent.name: Range Finder
T3MarksmanComponent.description: Unsurprisingly, if you want to acquire a range-finder, look for sharpshooters. But remember, if you can see them, they can probably see you.

T2MachineComponent.name: Complex Machinery
T2MachineComponent.description: Ironically, these components are found in many older fabricators and refineries, but cannot themselves be easily fabricated.

T1ExplorationComponent.name: Holtzman Actuator
T1ExplorationComponent.description: Those who make regular use of suspensor belts and similar technology often leave caches of these replacement parts in places only they can reach.

T3MiningGalleryComponent1.name: Calibrated Servok
T3MiningGalleryComponent1.description: These specialist servoks are commonly repurposed from heavy-duty equipment. This type of equipment was used extensively in Jabal Eifrit.

T3MiningGalleryComponent2.name: Ray Amplifier
T3MiningGalleryComponent2.description: Industrial production of bulk ores still commonly relies on drilling, but for mining more delicate materials such as crystals, a sophisticated cutteray is worth the investment. This type of equipment was used extensively to mine large parts of the Hagga Rift.

T5RadiatedCoreComponent.name: Irradiated Slag
T5RadiatedCoreComponent.description: A looted component used in crafting. Found in Radiated Core in the Sheol.

T4HarkSpiceSiloComponent1.name: Industrial Pump
T4HarkSpiceSiloComponent1.description: There are few uses for industrial-strength pumps on a planet as dry as Arrakis, but the Sandflies do utilize them in their operations in Sentinel City.

T4HarkSpiceSiloComponent2.name: Heavy Caliber Compressor
T4HarkSpiceSiloComponent2.description: The Sandflies often keep stashes of these components in their outposts, as they can be turned to various useful purposes.

T4HarkSpiceSiloComponent3.name: Light Caliber Compressor
T4HarkSpiceSiloComponent3.description: The Sandflies often keep stashes of these components in their outposts, as they can be turned to various useful purposes.

T4PyonVillageComponent.name: Insulated Fabric
T4PyonVillageComponent.description: Insulated fabric was one of the cottage industries of the O'odham, before the pyons were displaced from their old villages.

T4MysaTarilComponent1.name: Diamondine Dust
T4MysaTarilComponent1.description: This industrial byproduct is closely guarded by the Maas Kharet in their most sacred site. Nobody is entirely sure why.

T4MysaTarilComponent2.name: Carbide Scraps
T4MysaTarilComponent2.description: This industrial byproduct is closely guarded by the Maas Kharet in their most sacred site. Nobody is entirely sure why.

T4MaasKharetComponent1.name: Sandtrout Leathers
T4MaasKharetComponent1.description: The Maas Kharet have a particular affinity with this type of leather, and often make use of it in their clothing.

T4MaasKharetComponent2.name: Stillsuit Tubing
T4MaasKharetComponent2.description: The best tubing of course comes from the Fremen, but they do not share. The Maas Kharet are seen by many as a cheap imitation of the Fremen, and they produce a cheap imitation of Fremen stillsuit tubing.

T3VendorComponent1.name: Off-world Medical Supplies
T3VendorComponent1.description: Fremen medical tradition relies on only what the desert provides. Everyone else uses off-world pharmaceuticals, if they can get them.

T1UniqueComponent.name: Spice-infused Copper Dust
T1UniqueComponent.description: Truly Unique items often rely on spice-infused metal to enhance their qualities. Such metals are jealously horded by the most powerful groups, locked away in their most secure containers.

T2UniqueComponent.name: Spice-infused Iron Dust
T2UniqueComponent.description: Truly Unique items often rely on spice-infused metal to enhance their qualities. Such metals are jealously horded by the most powerful groups, locked away in their most secure containers.

T3UniqueComponent.name: Spice-infused Steel Dust
T3UniqueComponent.description: Truly Unique items often rely on spice-infused metal to enhance their qualities. Such metals are jealously horded by the most powerful groups, locked away in their most secure containers.

T4UniqueComponent.name: Spice-infused Aluminum Dust
T4UniqueComponent.description: Truly Unique items often rely on spice-infused metal to enhance their qualities. Such metals are jealously horded by the most powerful groups, locked away in their most secure containers.

T5UniqueComponent.name: Spice-infused Duraluminum Dust
T5UniqueComponent.description: Truly Unique items often rely on spice-infused metal to enhance their qualities. Such metals are jealously horded by the most powerful groups, locked away in their most secure containers.

T6UniqueComponent.name: Spice-infused Plastanium Dust
T6UniqueComponent.description: Truly Unique items often rely on spice-infused metal to enhance their qualities. Such metals are jealously horded by the most powerful groups, locked away in their most secure containers.

T6RefinedResourceA.name: Plastanium Ingot
T6RefinedResourceA.description: Pure titanium is extracted from its ore, heated until liquid, and then carefully threaded with stravidium fibers to enhance its strength.

T6RefinedResourceB.name: Stravidium Fiber
T6RefinedResourceB.description: These fibers are carefully drawn from a chemically-treated stravidium mass, and used in the production of plastanium.

WindTurbineLubricant1.name: Low-grade Lubricant
WindTurbineLubricant1.description: A low-grade lubricant required for omnidirectional wind turbines to function. Can be refined in a chemical refinery.

WindTurbineLubricant2.name: Industrial-grade Lubricant
WindTurbineLubricant2.description: An industrial quality lubricant required for directional wind turbines to function. Can be refined in a chemical refinery.

WindTrapFilter1.name: Makeshift Filter
WindTrapFilter1.description: A filter with simple functionality to keep Windtraps running and clear of sand. Fitted for smaller Windtraps. Can be crafted in a Survival Fabricator.

WindTrapFilter2.name: Standard Filter
WindTrapFilter2.description: A CHOAM-patented filter with improved protection against the harsh winds of Arakkis. Needed to keep Windtraps running and clear of sand. Fitted for smaller Windtraps. Can be crafted in a Survival Fabricator.

WindTrapFilter3.name: Particulate Filter
WindTrapFilter3.description: A thorough filter to catch any unwanted particles, dust and sand. Needed to keep Windtraps running and clear of sand. Fitted for Larger Windtraps. Can be crafted in a Survival Fabricator.

WindTrapFilter4.name: Advanced Particulate Filter
WindTrapFilter4.description: An advanced filter for catching any unwanted particles, dust and sand. Needed to keep Windtraps running and clear of sand. Fitted for Larger Windtraps. Can be crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

SpicedFuelCell.name: Spice-infused Fuel Cell
SpicedFuelCell.description: A fuel cell for spice-powered generators. Made from fuel cells and spice residue. Can be refined in a Medium Chemical Refinery.

T5FactionBaseComponent1.name: Military Power Regulator
T5FactionBaseComponent1.description: A component used to craft vehicle power units. The Great Houses have a stranglehold on this type of component on Arrakis and any who possess them must have forcibly wrested them from their control.

T5FactionBaseComponent2.name: Hydraulic Piston
T5FactionBaseComponent2.description: A component used to craft vehicle engines. The Great Houses have a stranglehold on this type of component on Arrakis and any who possess them must have forcibly wrested them from their control.

T5DeepDesertShieldWallComponent.name: Thermoelectric Cooler
T5DeepDesertShieldWallComponent.description: A crafting component used to cool down Harvesting tools used in the Deep Desert. Spare parts are usually found in the Deep Desert on the Shield Wall.

T6ArmorPlating.name: Plasteel Composite Armor Plating
T6ArmorPlating.description: An Armor crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6BladePart.name: Plasteel Composite Blade Parts
T6BladePart.description: A Melee weapon crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6GunPart.name: Plasteel Composite Gun Parts
T6GunPart.description: A Ranged Weapon crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6HoltzmanActuator.name: Improved Holtzman Actuator
T6HoltzmanActuator.description: A Traversal crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6RangeFinder.name: Precision Range Finder
T6RangeFinder.description: A Weapon crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6Machinery.name: Advanced Machinery
T6Machinery.description: An Infrastructure crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6RayAmplifier.name: Thermo-Responsive Ray Amplifier
T6RayAmplifier.description: A Utility crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6IrradiatedCore.name: Irradiated Core
T6IrradiatedCore.description: A power crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6IndustrialPump.name: Fluid Efficient Industrial Pump
T6IndustrialPump.description: A utility crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6HeavyCalliberCompressor.name: Fluted Heavy Caliber Compressor
T6HeavyCalliberCompressor.description: A weapon crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6LightCalliberCompressor.name: Fluted Light Caliber Compressor
T6LightCalliberCompressor.description: A weapon crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6FilteredFabric.name: Atmospheric Filtered Fabric
T6FilteredFabric.description: A utility crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6DiamodineBladeParts.name: Diamodine blade parts
T6DiamodineBladeParts.description: A melee weapon crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6CarbidePladeParts.name: Carbide blade parts
T6CarbidePladeParts.description: A melee weapon crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6BalisticWeave.name: Ballistic Weave Fabric
T6BalisticWeave.description: A light armor crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6Watertube.name: Improved Watertube
T6Watertube.description: A stillsuit crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6PowerRegulator.name: Overclocked Power Regulator
T6PowerRegulator.description: A vehicle module crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6HydraulicPiston.name: Tri-Forged Hydraulic Piston
T6HydraulicPiston.description: A vehicle module crafting component used in plastanium tier crafting. Can be found in the Deep Desert, obtained from Landsraad rewards, or crafted in an Advanced Survival Fabricator.

T6PlasteelComponent.name: Plasteel Plate
T6PlasteelComponent.description: A crafting component for crafting plasteel crafting components. Can be found in the Deep Desert, or obtained from Landsraad rewards.

WormTooth.name: Worm Tooth
WormTooth.description: A crafting component obtained from dying to the sandworm. Can be used to craft an unfixed crysknife.

LandsraadTreasureComponent1.name: Opafire Gem
LandsraadTreasureComponent1.description: One of the rare opaline jewels of Hagal. They shimmer with a captivating blend of fiery reds and cool iridescent hues.

LandsraadShipwreckComponent1.name: Ship Manifest
LandsraadShipwreckComponent1.description: Detailed records of cargo, crew, and routes. Useful for monitoring covert trade routes and spice shipments.

LandsraadComponent.name: Offworld Regis Compound

ContainerVehicle.name: Carrier Ornithopter Cargo Container
ContainerVehicle.description:
A cargo container with anchor points that can be lifted by the Carrier Ornithopter. Placed with the Welding Torch.
The logistics of transport on Arrakis have always been difficult and while this container makes moving large amounts of resources around the planet efficient, hazards such as sandworms and sandstorms are still a constant threat.

OrnithopterLightBoost_4.name: Scout Ornithopter Thruster Mk4
OrnithopterLightBoost_4.description: Adds a thrust ability to a Scout Ornithopter. Thrusters provide a triggerable burst of acceleration and increased maximum speed. Thrusters have a fixed duration and cooldown time. Use a Welding Torch to attach it to a Scout Ornithopter Body Hull.

OrnithopterLightBoost_Unique_LessHeat_4.name: Stormrider Boost Module Mk4
OrnithopterLightBoost_Unique_LessHeat_4.description: Though the sandstorms of Arrakis have been known to reach 700km an hour and tear metal to shreds, still there are those who insist on trying to boost through them. This Unique boost module has a larger air intake to avoid dust clogging - it keeps the 'thopter cool but at a cost of overall boost speed.

SandbikeSeat_1.name: Sandbike Backseat Mk1
SandbikeSeat_1.description: Adds additional seating for a passenger to a Sandbike. Attach the passenger seat to a Sandbike Hull with a Welding Torch.

SandcrawlerChassis_6.name: Sandcrawler Chassis Mk6
SandcrawlerChassis_6.description: The chassis is the starting point for assembling vehicles as it provides the base framework to which all other components are attached. Use a Welding Torch to place the Sandcrawler chassis

SandcrawlerEngine_6.name: Sandcrawler Engine Mk6
SandcrawlerEngine_6.description: Defines the acceleration and speed of the Sandcrawler. Use a Welding Torch to attach the engine to a Sandcrawler Chassis.

SandcrawlerEngine_Unique_Speed_06.name: Walker Sandcrawler Engine Mk6
SandcrawlerEngine_Unique_Speed_06.description: When every second on the sands counts, this Unique sandcrawler engine's increased speed will allow for quicker spice harvesting operations.

SandcrawlerGenerator_6.name: Sandcrawler PSU Mk6
SandcrawlerGenerator_6.description: Defines the power efficiency and manages the heat dissipation of a Sandcrawler. Use a Welding Torch to attach the PSU to a Sandcrawler Chassis.

SandcrawlerHull_6.name: Sandcrawler Cabin Mk6
SandcrawlerHull_6.description: Enclosed control module for a Sandcrawler. Includes seating for the driver and one passenger. Use a Welding Torch to attach the cabin to a Sandcrawler Chassis.

SandcrawlerLocomotion_6.name: Sandcrawler Tread Mk6
SandcrawlerLocomotion_6.description: Defines the grip of the Sandcrawler. Use a Welding Torch to attach the treads to a Sandcrawler Chassis. All attached treads must be of the same type.

SandcrawlerLocomotion_Unique_WormThreat_.name: Dampened Sandcrawler Treads
SandcrawlerLocomotion_Unique_WormThreat_.description: "Walk without rhythm and you won't attract the worm" is a difficult principle to apply to a vehicle that is designed to crawl around on sand sucking up spice. These Unique treads apply acoustic principles to lower their overall vibration — but the sandworm will always come regardless.

UniqueSword_05.name: Replica Pulse-sword
UniqueSword_05.description:
During the Butlerian Jihad, pulse-swords were used to cut through the thinking machines and damage their electronics with pulses of deadly electricity. It is said that the secret of their making was lost during the ensuing centuries.

This Unique blade gives a small jolt of electrical energy to the palms when parrying an enemy - offering a small stamina boost. A far cry from the legendary swords of the Butlerian Jihad.

UniqueSword_04.description:
During the Butlerian Jihad, pulse-swords were used to cut through the thinking machines and damage their electronics with pulses of deadly electricity. It is said that the secret of their making was lost during the ensuing centuries.

This Unique blade gives a small jolt of electrical energy to the palms when parrying an enemy — offering a small stamina boost. A far cry from the legendary swords of the Butlerian Jihad.

UniqueSword_02.description: During the Butlerian Jihad, pulse-swords were used to cut through the thinking machines and damage their electronics with pulses of deadly electricity. It is said that the secret of their making was lost during the ensuing centuries.
