UniqueSword.name: Pseudo Pulse-Sword
UniqueSword.description: During the Butlerian Jihad, pulse-swords were used to cut through the thinking machines and damage their electronics with pulses of deadly electricity. It is said that the secret of their making was lost during the ensuing centuries. This Unique blade gives a small jolt of electrical energy to the palms when parrying an enemy — offering a small stamina boost. A far cry from the legendary swords of the Butlerian Jihad.

UniqueSmg3.name: Sardaukar Intimidator
UniqueSmg3.description: A Unique Disruptor with heavy darts doubleshots for added damage. What it lacks in rate of fire it makes up for the punches it throws.

UniqueSmg2.name: Piter's Disruptor
UniqueSmg2.description: This Unique disruptor has been modified to spray doubleshots of heavy darts at a slower rate. The twisted mentat advisor to Baron Harkonnen, Piter de Vries, created this modified disruptor to be used to suppress riots on Giedi Prime. In his words, 'peace through suppression'.

UniqueSmg1.name: Abulurd's Rapture
UniqueSmg1.description: This Unique disruptor has been modified to spray doubleshots of heavy darts at a slower rate. The name is based on a popular joke that made the rounds on Arrakis a few years ago — a comment on the Baron's preferences and the virility of his younger brother, Abulurd. Anybody who was heard making the joke in Harkonnen territory was hanged, of course.

UniqueSda6.name: Way of the Misr
UniqueSda6.description: This Unique Maula pistol has a modified spring mechanism that automatically reloads darts without releasing trigger pressure. This model is older than any others, and seems to have been developed by the Fremen. It differs from the designs that integrate the modifications from Count Fenring.

UniqueSda5.name: Way of the Desert
UniqueSda5.description: This Unique Maula pistol has a modified spring mechanism that automatically reloads darts without releasing trigger pressure. Integrating the modifications from Count Hasimir Fenring, this newer design also accommodates better materials for longer durability.

UniqueSda4.name: Way of the Fighter
UniqueSda4.description: This Unique Maula pistol has a modified spring mechanism that automatically reloads darts without releasing trigger pressure. Integrating the modifications from Count Hasimir Fenring, this newer design also accommodates better materials for longer durability.

UniqueSda3.name: Way of the Lost
UniqueSda3.description: This Unique Maula pistol has a modified spring mechanism that automatically reloads darts without releasing trigger pressure. Integrating the modifications from Count Hasimir Fenring, this newer design also accommodates better materials for longer durability.

UniqueSda2.name: Way of the Wanderer
UniqueSda2.description: This Unique Maula pistol has a modified spring mechanism that automatically reloads darts without releasing trigger pressure. Integrating the modifications from Count Hasimir Fenring, this newer design also accommodates better materials for longer durability.

UniqueSda1.name: Way of the Fallen
UniqueSda1.description: This Unique Maula pistol has a modified spring mechanism that automatically reloads darts without releasing trigger pressure. Rumor has it that Count Hasimir Fenring designed this modification himself, admiring the design of the maula pistol while decrying the inefficiency of its firing mechanism.

UniqueSda_Doubleshot_06.name: Shishakli's Bite
UniqueSda_Doubleshot_06.description: A too-tight spring in the magazine coupled with a too-wide barrel make this Unique maula pistol fire bursts of two darts at the same time, albeit with reduced accuracy. Manufacturers have labelled these obvious problems as "features".

UniqueSda_Doubleshot_05.name: Taqwa's Double
UniqueSda_Doubleshot_05.description: A Unique maula pistol developed in the shadow of Taqwa's Watch in the O'odham. Though Fremen battles rarely rely solely upon the maula pistol, it is still prudent to carry one — especially one with the capacity to fire double-shots bursts.

UniqueSda_Doubleshot_04.name: Shadrath's Edge
UniqueSda_Doubleshot_04.description: Shadrath crafted this Unique Maula pistol during his razzia against the Sardaukar bases around the Shield Wall. The double shot burst firing mechanism caused some inaccuracy in the shots, but it made up for it with the ability to puncture Sardaukar armor.

UniqueScattergun5.name: Perforator
UniqueScattergun5.description: Thin spikes in the barrel mean that the darts fired from this Unique scattergun will break into multiple shrapnel pieces on impact, causing a bleeding effect on enemies. Another example of Sardaukar weaponry built to intimidate and oppress.

UniqueScattergun4.name: Syndicate Impaler
UniqueScattergun4.description: Thin spikes in the barrel mean that the darts fired from this Unique scattergun will break into multiple shrapnel pieces on impact, causing a bleeding effect on enemies. Brought from offworld only by Syndicate mercenaries, these formidable scatterguns are rarely found on Arrakis.

UniqueScattergun3.name: Eviscerator
UniqueScattergun3.description: Thin spikes in the barrel mean that the darts fired from this Unique scattergun will break into multiple shrapnel pieces on impact, causing a bleeding effect on enemies. Sandflies propaganda states that this weapon was used against them when they rebelled, though there are no records of the mining guild ever having access to such weapons.

UniqueScattergun2.name: Ripper
UniqueScattergun2.description: Thin spikes in the barrel mean that the darts fired from this Unique scattergun will break into multiple shrapnel pieces on impact, causing a bleeding effect on enemies. The slavers claim that they are the ones who designed this weapon — it is commonly used among them for crowd control.

UniqueScattergun1.name: Shredder
UniqueScattergun1.description: Thin spikes in the barrel mean that the darts fired from this Unique scattergun will break into multiple shrapnel pieces on impact, causing a bleeding effect on enemies. It isn't known who created such a sadistic weapon — but it is commonly used by the Kirab of Hagga Basin.

UniqueScattergun_Fire_06.name: Shellburster
UniqueScattergun_Fire_06.description: This Unique scattergun was used during the Battle of Arrakeen. When Harkonnen troops charged the front gates of the palace, they were dismayed to find the shields still functional, despite being assured otherwise. A group of Atreides gunners used shellburst scatterguns to spread fire and chaos among the Harkonnen ranks, breaking them.

UniqueScattergun_Fire_05.name: Starburst
UniqueScattergun_Fire_05.description: This Unique scattergun was first discovered aboard the wreck of the Euporia in the Sheol. The crew and weapons on board were Ixian, leading to speculation that the weapon was sidestepping the prohibitions of the Butlerian Jihad. However, when the weapon was opened up, it was a disappointingly standard application of heat transference principles.

UniqueScattergun_Fire_04.name: Firestorm
UniqueScattergun_Fire_04.description: The Sandflies created this Unique scattergun by combining some of the principles of the cutteray with the necessities of modern warfare. The darts in this scattergun are superheated by a scalpel sized laser so that when they are fired they burst into flaming particles on impact.

UniqueRapier_Power_06.name: Static Needle
UniqueRapier_Power_06.description: This Unique rapier is utilized by House forces to shock and disrupt the power supplies of their opponents.

UniqueRapier_03.name: Halleck's Pick
UniqueRapier_03.description: This Unique sword contains a series of toxin releasing nodules along the length of the blade. Gurney Halleck, renowned troubadour and mercenary, kept a similar blade by his side when performing for noble audiences. When a drunken noble once asked if he felt his music was bad enough that he needed a sword to defend it, Gurney replied: 'Nay, I fear not your wrath, but when your wives and daughters rush the stage — I'll need steel to keep my trousers fastened!'

UniqueRapier_02.name: Kharet Viper
UniqueRapier_02.description: This Unique sword contains a series of toxin releasing nodules along the length of the blade. When struck with enough force, these nodules release a burst of poisonous gas — capable of passing through a shield. The Maas Kharet probably borrowed this design from the slavers — filling it with a poison of their own.

UniqueRapier.name: Poison Mist
UniqueRapier.description: A lethally modified version of a slaver weapon, this Unique sword contains a series of toxin releasing nodules along the length of the blade. When struck with enough force, these nodules release a burst of poisonous gas — capable of passing through a shield. The slaver version of this weapon was used to release a sedative gas for capturing the unwilling.

UniqueFlameThrower_02.name: Vaporizer
UniqueFlameThrower_02.description:
While artillery weapons and projectiles became deemphasized with the invention of the Holtzman shield, the humble flamethrower saw wider adoption in the military forces of the Imperium. Holtzman shields provide very little protection against being slowly cooked from the outside.

This Unique flamethrower has a higher gel capacity and more intense flame.

UniqueFlameThrower.name: Shaitan's Tongue
UniqueFlameThrower.description:
If there was one weapon the Sardaukar used to inspire fear in the Fremen, it was the flamethrower. In the narrow corridors of the sietch warrens, a single Sardaukar could become a firestorm of death and destruction. Perhaps worse, for the Fremen, the corpses could not be recovered for their water.

This Unique flamethrower has a higher gel capacity and more intense flame.

UniqueDirk_04.name: Cauterizer
UniqueDirk_04.description: This Unique knife is a modified surgical tool that was developed for treating field injuries. It seals injuries as it cuts using a small cutteray to superheat the blade. Mostly useful for amputations and as desperate field surgeons discovered, setting your enemy on fire.

UniqueDirk_03.name: Moisture Sealer
UniqueDirk_03.description: Ironically, the Fremen themselves might be the origin of this knife. For moisture sealing caves, they used this Unique knife to quickly seal the plastic hoods against the cave walls. And for removal, they simply reheated the dirk and sliced the melted plastic from the walls.

UniqueDirk_02.name: Denira's Gift
UniqueDirk_02.description:
Denira Quirth ran a supply depot for the Sandflies for many years, ensuring the flow of spice and other goods to the smugglers, in return for the basic supplies they needed to survive.

This Unique dirk was reportedly a gift from Esmar Tuek himself a product of black-market technology that only a smuggler could access.

UniqueDirk.name: Searing Shiv
UniqueDirk.description: Once there was a slave called Fila. She was captured by slavers while very young and dragged to Arrakis to serve the Harkonnen as a slave. While she lay dreaming in a slaver camp in Jabal Eifrit, disturbed by the spice that she was ingesting from the air, she dreamed of a flaming dirk that could set her free. When she woke, this Unique dirk was in her hand. Fila slew several of her captors, burning them with the knife, before she fled south and disappeared. Though some say, she changed her name to Mendia and her story continued.

UniqueAr4.name: Salusan Vengeance
UniqueAr4.description: When Salusa Secundus was reduced from a fertile planet to an irradiated wasteland of a planet, House Corrino swore vengeance on their enemies. This Unique battle rifle was created as a memory of that oath and the explosive darts that it fires are reminiscent of the fires that rained down on Salusa Secundus itself.

UniqueAr3.name: Scrubber
UniqueAr3.description: Another weapon liberated from the shipwrecks of the Sheol, this Unique battle rifle has been modified with a mechanism that adds a touch of explosive powder to every dart that passes down the barrel. Perhaps used as protection against smuggler or pirate attacks in the interplanetary shipping lanes.

UniqueAr2.name: Pipecleaner
UniqueAr2.description: This Unique battle rifle has been modified with a mechanism that adds a touch of explosive powder to every dart that passes down the barrel. The Sandflies use weapons like this to rapidly clear rubble filled tunnels beneath the Sentinel, hence the name.

UniqueAr1.name: The Tapper
UniqueAr1.description: This Unique battle rifle has been modified with a mechanism that adds a touch of explosive powder to every dart that passes down the barrel. Though ranged weapons are uncommon elsewhere in the Imperium, on Arrakis they have become more prevalent due to the deemphasis on shields.

UniqueAr_Burst_06.name: Indara's Lullaby
UniqueAr_Burst_06.description: When the War of Assassins came to Arrakis, Indara and her husband, Ardan, were stationed at a small Atreides outpost on the shield wall. As the relentless attacks of the Harkonnens continued, Ardan forced Indara to flee into a nearby cave system with their young child. Nobody knows why this Unique weapon is named for Indara - but there is speculation that she and her child still haunt the caves of the Deep Desert Shield Wall. This rifle fires a modified three-round burst, with the final dart in the burst dealing additional damage.

UniqueAr_Burst_05.name: Mendek's Rattle
UniqueAr_Burst_05.description:
General Mendek was a swordsman all his life, until he was stationed on Arrakis. When he saw the lack of shields among the Fremen, he commissioned a Unique burst shot battle rifle which deals additional damage when firing the final dart in the burst.

'The first shot is for the Baron. The second is for my lady wife. And the last shot is for forcing me to be stationed on this godsforsaken dustbowl.'

UniqueAr_Burst_04.name: Stammershot
UniqueAr_Burst_04.description:
A young Atreides engineer with a very bad stutter was routinely ridiculed by his fellows stationed at The Aegis. To reduce his stutter, he began using semuta to help calm his mind. He became an addict, hopelessly enthralled to his semuta supplier — a Harkonnen agent.

This specially modified Unique rifle fires in a three-round burst, with the final dart in the burst dealing additional damage. It was the last thing many heard at The Aegis when the young man turned it upon his once-comrades and then himself.

UniqueAr_Burst_03.name: Zaal's Companion
UniqueAr_Burst_03.description: Zaal Karak captured this rifle on a raid into the Vermillius Gap for fresh slaves. He admired the workmanship, particularly that the final dart of its three-round burst is more potent, but chose to reinforce it with more robust materials. Other slavers copied him and now this once-Unique rifle is popular amongst the slavers of the basin.

UniqueAr_Burst_02.name: Fila's Regret
UniqueAr_Burst_02.description: Nobody truly knows who Fila is or was, but it is rumored that she, for a while, was mistress to Aren, a Kirab Warlord. That may explain why this Unique rifle is similar to one wielded by Aren during his final days, with the final dart of its three-round burst dealing additional damage. But did he create the rifle, or was it the work of the mysterious Fila?

UniqueAr_Burst_01.name: Aren's Vengeance
UniqueAr_Burst_01.description: When Aren was ousted by the Kirab, he brought some of their technology with him into the Southern basin. This Unique battle rifle is based on a similar Kirab model, with the final dart of its three-round burst dealing additional damage. Aren's intention was to eventually lead an army of scavengers north to take vengeance on his old comrades.

SurveyProbeLauncher.name: Survey Probe Launcher
SurveyProbeLauncher.description: Launch a Survey Probe from high altitude to map out worthwhile information about your surrounding area.

SurveyProbe_1.name: Survey Probe
SurveyProbe_1.description: "Ammunition" to be loaded into a Survey Probe Launcher. Launch one probe at a high altitude to map the local area. Fremen origin.

StaticCompactorTier6.name: Omni Static Compactor
StaticCompactorTier6.description: Point and shoot at a spice field to compact the spice into a clump of sand that can be picked up. Can be made from Fremen components. Depletes power from a Power Pack on use.

StaticCompactor_Unique_Compact_06.name: Compact Compactor Mk6
StaticCompactor_Unique_Compact_06.description: The makers of this Unique static compactor prioritized reducing size, power draw, and most importantly worm attention.

StaticCompactor_Unique_Compact_05.name: Compact Compactor Mk5
StaticCompactor_Unique_Compact_05.description: The makers of this Unique static compactor prioritized reducing size, power draw, and most importantly worm attention.

StaticCompactor_Unique_Compact_04.name: Compact Compactor Mk4
StaticCompactor_Unique_Compact_04.description: The makers of this Unique static compactor prioritized reducing size, power draw, and most importantly worm attention.

StaticCompactor_Unique_Compact_03.name: Compact Compactor Mk3
StaticCompactor_Unique_Compact_03.description: The makers of this Unique static compactor prioritized reducing size, power draw, and most importantly worm attention.

SmugShot5.name: Regis Drillshot FK7
SmugShot5.description: Double barrel mid range shotgun that fires "burrow darts". When colliding with an active shield, burrow darts stick to them and penetrate them after a short time, dealing damage to the protected target.

SmugShot4.name: Adept Drillshot FK7
SmugShot4.description: Double barrel mid range shotgun that fires "burrow darts". When colliding with an active shield, burrow darts stick to them and penetrate them after a short time, dealing damage to the protected target.

SmugShot3.name: House Drillshot FK7
SmugShot3.description: Double barrel mid range shotgun that fires "burrow darts". When colliding with an active shield, burrow darts stick to them and penetrate them after a short time, dealing damage to the protected target.

SmugDmr6.name: Regis JABAL Spitdart
SmugDmr6.description: Another workhorse of a weapon, the JABAL Spitdart is scoped for long range engagements and fires darts capable of poisoning targets.

SmugDmr5.name: Adept JABAL Spitdart
SmugDmr5.description: Another workhorse of a weapon, the JABAL Spitdart is scoped for long range engagements and fires darts capable of poisoning targets.

SmugDmr4.name: House JABAL Spitdart
SmugDmr4.description: Another workhorse of a weapon, the JABAL Spitdart is scoped for long range engagements and fires darts capable of poisoning targets.

SmugDmr3.name: Artisan JABAL Spitdart
SmugDmr3.description: Another workhorse of a weapon, the JABAL Spitdart is scoped for long range engagements and fires darts capable of poisoning targets.

SMG_Unique_LargeMag_06.name: A Dart for Every Man
SMG_Unique_LargeMag_06.description: This Unique disruptor has a small inscription beneath the barrel, beside the makers mark. It reads 'In honor of the Faufreluches — a dart for every man and for every man a dart.' No matter how often the schematics are modified, this inscription is always fabricated on the weapon.

SMG_Unique_LargeMag_05.name: Relentless
SMG_Unique_LargeMag_05.description: The Atreides base in the Hagga Basin overlooks the radiated shipwrecks of the Sheol. Sometimes, during the long watches of the night, when a soldier has time to contemplate their life on Arrakis, they take the long elevator down to the sands and disappear into the south. This Unique disruptor is named as an insult to those who would desert their posts — and used against them if they are ever seen again.

SMG_Unique_LargeMag_04.name: Ironwatch Special
SMG_Unique_LargeMag_04.description: The history of Ironwatch is tied to the fate of the great Ironworks of Vermillius Gap. When they were abandoned, so was Ironwatch. This Unique disruptor is known as an Ironwatch Special because many of them were found stockpiled in the basement when the Sandflies reclaimed the base.

SMG_Unique_LargeMag_03.name: Seb's Kisser
SMG_Unique_LargeMag_03.description: Seb was a veteran of the Kytheria, that came down in the Hagga Rift. With a few survivors, Seb was able to escape the rift and overtake a small slaver cave near the edge of the rift. This Unique high-capacity disruptor was a part of his success — though it is said that he later traded the secret of manufacturing them to Smiley Tyg at the Anvil Tradepost.

SMG_Unique_LargeMag_02.name: Legion Tattoo
SMG_Unique_LargeMag_02.description: Smiley Tyg sometimes has special goods that he sells with no questions asked or answered. A few seasons ago, schematics for a Unique high-capacity disruptor — a weapon focused on attacking shields — began to appear in his stock at the Anvil Tradepost. Rumors that they were plundered from a Sardaukar convoy ambushed by Zantara the Lion earned them their moniker as the Legion Tattoo — bolstered by the rhythm they make as they fire.

Shotgun_Unique_Explosive_06.name: Regis Burst Drillshot
Shotgun_Unique_Explosive_06.description: An increased capacity makes this Unique Drillshot the anti-shield weapon of choice. An added charge mechanism was added to the base FK7, powering up devastating 2-round bursts of burrow darts.

Shotgun_Unique_Explosive_05.name: Adept Burst Drillshot
Shotgun_Unique_Explosive_05.description: An increased capacity makes this Unique Drillshot the anti-shield weapon of choice. An added charge mechanism was added to the base FK7, powering up devastating 2-round bursts of burrow darts.

Shotgun_Unique_Explosive_04.name: House Burst Drillshot
Shotgun_Unique_Explosive_04.description: An increased capacity makes this Unique Drillshot the anti-shield weapon of choice. An added charge mechanism was added to the base FK7, powering up devastating 2-round bursts of burrow darts.

Shotgun_Unique_Blood_06.name: Penetrator
Shotgun_Unique_Blood_06.description: This Unique scattergun fires drilling darts which penetrate slowly through a Holtzman shield and then continue drilling — causing gaping bleeding wounds to the enemy. When the inventor was asked about the juvenile name he simply replied 'I'm all about drilling through defenses and going deep. I also design weapons. Ask your mother.'

ScrapMetalKnife.name: Scrap Metal Knife
ScrapMetalKnife.description: Designed by necessity using whatever is close at hand, many resort to this melee weapon for short-range Blade Damage.

Scattergun_Prototype3.name: Regis GRDA 44
Scattergun_Prototype3.description: Heavy for its size, it is highly recommended to hold the GRDA 44 with both hands, despite certain actors portraying its use with one in each hand.

Scattergun_Prototype2.name: Adept GRDA 44
Scattergun_Prototype2.description: Heavy for its size, it is highly recommended to hold the GRDA 44 with both hands, despite certain actors portraying its use with one in each hand.

Scattergun_Prototype1.name: House GRDA 44
Scattergun_Prototype1.description: Heavy for its size, it is highly recommended to hold the GRDA 44 with both hands, despite certain actors portraying its use with one in each hand.

Scattergun_Prototype0.name: Artisan GRDA 44
Scattergun_Prototype0.description: Heavy for its size, it is highly recommended to hold the GRDA 44 with both hands, despite certain actors portraying its use with one in each hand.

Scattergun_Prototype.name: Standard GRDA 44
Scattergun_Prototype.description: Heavy for its size, it is highly recommended to hold the GRDA 44 with both hands, despite certain actors portraying its use with one in each hand. A Great House item.

Scanner_Unique_Body_03.name: Handheld Life Scanner Mk3
Scanner_Unique_Body_03.description: A Unique scanner that specializes in only detecting the living.

Scanner_Efficient_1.name: Long Range Scanner
Scanner_Efficient_1.description: An Unique improved power-driven handheld exploration scanner that allows the user to project a scan in front of them to mark information on their map.

Scanner_Base_1.name: Handheld Resource Scanner
Scanner_Base_1.description: A power-driven handheld exploration scanner that allows the user to project a scan in front of them to mark information on their map. Can be fabricated with Fremen components.

RocketLauncher_Unique_Homing_06.name: The Ancient Way
RocketLauncher_Unique_Homing_06.description: When Holtzman shields became widely available, the use of artillery in warfare dramatically reduced. During the Battle of Arrakeen, the Baron Harkonnen brought them back, using heavy rockets to seal Atreides soldiers in caves, thus avoiding the problem of Holtzman shields entirely. Since then, these Unique missile launchers have become widely sought after by Fremen and Imperial troops alike.

RocketLauncher_2.name: Regis Missile Launcher
RocketLauncher_2.description: A launcher that shoots homing missiles.

RocketAmmo.name: Rocket
RocketAmmo.description: A rocket projectile with an explosive warhead and a propellant for extra thrust. Typically utilized by vehicular rocket launchers.

Rapier_3.name: Regis Rapier
Rapier_3.description:
Opening attacks: use the attack button to parry incoming attacks and move the character forward. Use the the aim button to parry and move the character backward.

The Great House Atreides Rapier is a longer sword used for self-defense by the most skilled swordmasters. The long blade allows for reach and raw damage, as well as penetrates shields. To truly master the rapier, its carrier must be quick on their feet and swift to react.

Rapier_0.name: Adept Rapier
Rapier_0.description:
Opening attacks: use the attack button to parry incoming attacks and move the character forward. Use the the aim button to parry and move the character backward.

The Great House Atreides Rapier is a longer sword used for self-defense by the most skilled swordmasters. The long blade allows for reach and raw damage, as well as penetrates shields. To truly master the rapier, its carrier must be quick on their feet and swift to react.

Rapier.name: House Rapier
Rapier.description:
Opening attacks: use the attack button to parry incoming attacks and move the character forward. Use the the aim button to parry and move the character backward.

The Great House Atreides Rapier is a longer sword used for self-defense by the most skilled swordmasters. The long blade allows for reach and raw damage, as well as penetrates shields. To truly master the rapier, its carrier must be quick on their feet and swift to react.

ScrapMetalKnife_NPENPC.name: Scrap Metal Knife
ScrapMetalKnife_NPENPC.description: Designed by necessity using whatever is close at hand, many resort to this melee weapon for short-range Blade Damage.

Napalm.name: Incendiary Gel
Napalm.description: Few weapons inspire the type of fear created by fire. Use this ammunition in conjunction with incendiary weapons to instill maximum terror in your adversaries.

MiningTool_2h_Unique_04.name: Kynes's Cutteray
MiningTool_2h_Unique_04.description: Pardot Kynes was a driven man and single-minded in his quest to teach the Fremen the language of ecological transformation. He gave them access to the technology of the Imperium — allowing them to greatly expand their catchbasins and windtraps. Pardot was also a very hands-on type and this Unique cutteray was crafted and tuned to his exacting specifications.

MiningTool_2h_Unique_03.name: Tarl Cutteray
MiningTool_2h_Unique_03.description: When Pardot Kynes began his work with the Fremen, he brought them into the Imperial Testing Stations as laborers. He gave them access to the technology and science of the Imperium. Soon enough, cutterays began appearing in Sietchs, sculpting tunnels and windtraps to help with Pardot's long term plans. This Unique cutteray has been optimized for the ores and rock deposits on the area around Sietch Tarl.

MiningTool_2h_Unique_02.name: Sandflies Carver
MiningTool_2h_Unique_02.description: Optimized for the operations of the Sandflies, this Unique cutteray lasts longer than a regular cutteray and delivers increased yields of aluminum.

MiningTool_2h_Unique_01.name: Callie's Breaker
MiningTool_2h_Unique_01.description: Callie worked the great galleries of the rift, until the Kytheria crashed and the war escalated into the caverns. She joined the deserters, carving tunnels through the old mining galleries using her trusty buggy and her favorite tool. Callie was lost when one of the tunnels she was opening collapsed beneath her, but her Uniquetool was retrieved.

MiningTool_2h_Standard.name: Cutteray Mk3
MiningTool_2h_Standard.description: Heavy cutteray capable of mining aluminum. Depletes power from a Power Pack. Fabricated with Fremen parts.

MiningTool_2h_Light.name: Cutteray Mk5
MiningTool_2h_Light.description: Robust cutteray capable of mining titanium and stravidium. Depletes power from a Power Pack. Fabricated from Fremen parts.

MiningTool_2h_Heavy.name: Cutteray Mk4
MiningTool_2h_Heavy.description: Cutteray capable of mining jasmium crystals, which are a necessity to refine duraluminum. Depletes power from a Power Pack. Fabricated from Fremen parts.

MiningTool_2h_Advanced.name: Cutteray Mk6
MiningTool_2h_Advanced.description: Top-of-the-line cutteray capable of mining virtually anything. Depletes power from a Power Pack. Fabricated with Fremen parts.

MiningTool_1h_Unique_02.name: Olef's Quickcutter
MiningTool_1h_Unique_02.description: When Olef was assigned to the great ironworks in Vermillius Gap, he didn't despair. He saw opportunity amongst the spires of stone — a lot of thirsty miners and nowhere to drink. He started stealing supplies and set up his own little after-hours establishment selling spice-laced moonshine. Before long, he was so busy he had no time to fill his mining quotas. He had a drunk engineer create this Unique cutteray to help him stay afloat.

MiningTool_1h_Unique_01.name: Sim's Cutter
MiningTool_1h_Unique_01.description: When the mining facilities were abandoned in the Vermillius Gap, Sim and his fellow miners decided to try their luck as scavengers. Sim 'borrowed' a Unique cutteray from the ironworks, discovering too late that it was tuned for increased Granite, Copper and Salvage yields and only had basic Iron yields. 'Oh the iron-y' Sim was heard to exclaim.

MiningTool_1h_Standard.name: Improvised Cutteray
MiningTool_1h_Standard.description: Harmless to humans, it is uniquely suited to extracting resources. This version works on granite, copper, metal, and doors. Analysis mode shows weak points. Depletes power from a Power Pack.

MiningTool_1h_Light.name: Cutteray Mk2
MiningTool_1h_Light.description: Cutteray capable of mining carbon, which is a necessity to refine steel. Depletes power from a Power Pack. Fabricated from Fremen parts.

MiningTool_1h_Heavy.name: Cutteray Mk1
MiningTool_1h_Heavy.description: Cutteray capable of mining iron. Depletes power from a Power Pack. Fabricated from Fremen parts.

LongRifle_Unique_Poison_06.name: Dunewatcher
LongRifle_Unique_Poison_06.description: Fremen warriors modified these Unique rifles and used them in their relentless guerilla campaign against the Harkonnen. A single Fremen could remain, near buried and practically invisible in the sand dunes beside a spice blow, awaiting their chance at Harkonnen prey. These warriors were called Dunewatchers.

LongRifle_Unique_Poison_05.name: Thufir's Best
LongRifle_Unique_Poison_05.description: Piter de Vries and Thufir Hawat are both trained assassins as well as Mentats. In the few instances where their masters must meet under a sign of truce, both men are responsible for the security of their lords beneath the Guild Peace. The soldiers who oversee these meetings are equipped with this Unique rifle and placed at strategic locations. They have steady hands and a calm demeanor — anything else could quickly lead to disaster.

LongRifle_Unique_Poison_04.name: Long Shot
LongRifle_Unique_Poison_04.description: This Unique rifle was named for an assassin who was paid a huge sum by the Atreides to take down the Beast Rabban. Witnesses say that the shot was perfect — lodging a poison dart deep into Rabban's neck — and that he laughed and pulled it out while his bodyguard swarmed the assassin.

LongRifle_Unique_Poison_03.name: Assassin's Rifle
LongRifle_Unique_Poison_03.description: Many in the Imperium have heard of chaumurky, poison administered through the drink, and chaumas, poison delivered through the food. This Unique rifle toys with a third concept — poison delivered in a small explosive dart that explodes on contact with a shield, allowing it to waft through.

LongRifle_Unique_LargeMag_06.name: Regis Tripleshot Repeating Rifle
LongRifle_Unique_LargeMag_06.description: This Unique non-scoped Spitdart Rifle was developed with increased magazine capacity and fires poison-coated darts in a horizontal tripleshot pattern.

LongRifle_Unique_LargeMag_05.name: Fivefinger's Tripleshot Rifle
LongRifle_Unique_LargeMag_05.description: For many years, the nobles of House Wydras lived in constant fear of an assassin's dart fired by the infamous Fivefingers. In his youth, he lost his right hand and eye during a duel with a Wydras nobleman. He disappeared from public eye for a long time — then returned with this Unique tripleshot rifle to wreak vengeance on those who had left him maimed.

LMG_Unique_RapidFire_06.name: Bashar's Command
LMG_Unique_RapidFire_06.description: This Unique machine gun is considered so effective at cowing the populace during wars, it is often placed on display in local population centers as a threat. However, the Sardaukar prefer not to carry such bulky weapons into conflict, and will only do so at a Bashar's Command.

LMG_Unique_RapidFire_05.name: Extravagant Message
LMG_Unique_RapidFire_05.description: A favored weapon of the Smuggler, Esmar Tuek, this Unique Vulcan gun leaves a mess wherever it is fired. Tuek, it is said, is a man who likes to make sure that when he sends a message to his enemies, it is heard.

LMG_Unique_RapidFire_04.name: Experimental Vulcan GAU-94
LMG_Unique_RapidFire_04.description: Developed in the warfare labs of House Thorvald, this Unique Vulcan gun uses new materials science to strip weight and replace it with capacity. Though highly sought after, these guns are experimental and banned from CHOAM export. How this arrived on Arrakis, is a mystery.

LMG_Unique_Power_06.name: Plasma Cannon
LMG_Unique_Power_06.description: Originally designed to fire a steady stream of blue orbs at hellish foes, this Unique plasma gun tears imps to shreds and rips Arch-viles and Cacodemons apart. Oh... I've just been informed this text is for DUNE not DOOM. Ignore me then.

Kindjal_Unique_Stamina_06.name: Replica Pulse-knife
Kindjal_Unique_Stamina_06.description:
During the Butlerian Jihad, pulse-blades were used to cut through the thinking machines and damage their electronics with pulses of deadly electricity. It is said that the secret of their making was lost during the ensuing centuries.

This Unique blade gives a small jolt of electrical energy to the palms when hitting an enemy — offering a small stamina boost. A far cry from the legendary weapons of the Butlerian Jihad.

Kindjal_Unique_Stamina_05.name: Jolt-knife
Kindjal_Unique_Stamina_05.description:
During the Butlerian Jihad, pulse-blades were used to cut through the thinking machines and damage their electronics with pulses of deadly electricity. It is said that the secret of their making was lost during the ensuing centuries.

This Unique blade gives a small jolt of electrical energy to the palms when hitting an enemy — offering a small stamina boost. A far cry from the legendary weapons of the Butlerian Jihad.

Kindjal_Unique_Stamina_04.name: Spark-Knife
Kindjal_Unique_Stamina_04.description:
During the Butlerian Jihad, pulse-blades were used to cut through the thinking machines and damage their electronics with pulses of deadly electricity. It is said that the secret of their making was lost during the ensuing centuries.

This Unique blade gives a small jolt of electrical energy to the palms when hitting an enemy — offering a small stamina boost. A far cry from the legendary weapons of the Butlerian Jihad.

Kindjal_Unique_Stamina_03.name: Shock-Knife
Kindjal_Unique_Stamina_03.description:
During the Butlerian Jihad, pulse-blades were used to cut through the thinking machines and damage their electronics with pulses of deadly electricity. It is said that the secret of their making was lost during the ensuing centuries.

This Unique blade gives a small jolt of electrical energy to the palms when hitting an enemy — offering a small stamina boost. A far cry from the legendary weapons of the Butlerian Jihad.

Kindjal_Unique_Blood_06.name: Feyd's Drinker
Kindjal_Unique_Blood_06.description: Commonly used in his black-gloved main-hand during arena bouts, Feyd-Rautha Harkonnen had a small compartment designed that could deliver poison - though usually it was the white-gloved off-hand that carried the poisoned blade. Though most never knew of his treachery, this Unique kindjal became popular on Arrakis for the opposite reason, it was capable of stealing blood from enemies and storing it in the compartment.

Kindjal_Unique_Blood_05.name: Pardot's Drinker
Kindjal_Unique_Blood_05.description: Pardot Kynes first came into contact with the Fremen by killing three Harkonnen bravos who were attacking Fremen youth. Kynes lamented violence — not the act, but the loss of blood and thus, precious water, it incurred. He developed this Unique kindjal simply because if he was forced to kill others, he didn't want it to be wasteful.

Kindjal_Unique_Blood_04.name: Shadrath's Drinker
Kindjal_Unique_Blood_04.description: This Unique kindjal was used as an off-hand weapon by the Fremen warrior Shadrath in his campaign against the Sardaukar. Though a Fremen would never be far from their crysknife, a secondary blade can help to stay alive, particularly if it serves the function of capturing water during fights.

Kindjal_Unique_Blood_03.name: Glutton's Drinker
Kindjal_Unique_Blood_03.description: This Unique kindjal slurps up blood as it cuts — thoroughly suitable for the mysterious entity known only as the Glutton. Though few have claimed to see him in person, the wounds left by this knife are unmistakable.

Kindjal_Unique_Blood_02.name: Scipio's Drinker
Kindjal_Unique_Blood_02.description: Scipio the warlord liked to draw blood from his enemies during torture. He created this Unique kindjal based on one he had stolen in the Southern Hagga Basin. Made of more advanced materials, this kindjal works on the same  principle — small grooves feed blood into the hilt which can be emptied into a waiting container.

Kindjal_Unique_Blood_01.name: Kaleff's Drinker
Kindjal_Unique_Blood_01.description: Cornered in a cave by Sardaukar forces, Kaleff managed to stay alive for weeks without a water source, only emerging to draw blood from his enemies. When he was finally killed, the Sardaukar discovered this Unique kindjal modified to include an exsanguination apparatus.

Kindjal_4.name: Regis Kindjal
Kindjal_4.description: A common personal weapon popular among the family members of this Great House, the Atreides Kindjal is styled after the particular variety that Duke Leto Atreides himself carries.

Kindjal_3.name: Adept Kindjal
Kindjal_3.description: A common personal weapon popular among the family members of this Great House, the Atreides Kindjal is styled after the particular variety that Duke Leto Atreides himself carries.

Kindjal_2.name: House Kindjal
Kindjal_2.description: A common personal weapon popular among the family members of this Great House, the Atreides Kindjal is styled after the particular variety that Duke Leto Atreides himself carries.

Kindjal_1.name: Artisan Kindjal
Kindjal_1.description: A common personal weapon popular among the family members of this Great House, the Atreides Kindjal is styled after the particular variety that Duke Leto Atreides himself carries.

Kindjal_0.name: Standard Kindjal
Kindjal_0.description: A common personal weapon popular among the family members of this Great House, the Atreides Kindjal is styled after the particular variety that Duke Leto Atreides himself carries.

Kindjal.name: Kindjal
Kindjal.description: A common personal weapon popular among the family members of this Great House, the Atreides Kindjal is styled after the particular variety that Duke Leto Atreides himself carries.

InfantryRocketAmmo.name: Missile
InfantryRocketAmmo.description: A missile projectile that is typically utilized by infantry missile launchers.

HeavyPistol_Unique_Headshot_06.name: Seethe
HeavyPistol_Unique_Headshot_06.description: This Unique pistol comes with increased accuracy and bonus damage for headshots, but with a low capacity clip.

HeavyPistol_Unique_Headshot_05.name: Cope
HeavyPistol_Unique_Headshot_05.description: This Unique pistol comes with increased accuracy and bonus damage for headshots, but with a low capacity clip.

HeavyPistol_Unique_Bleed_06.name: Regis Disruptor Pistol
HeavyPistol_Unique_Bleed_06.description: This Unique heavy pistol borrows technology from the fast-firing disruptor submachine gun, while adding a charging mechanism to fire shield-destabilizing darts.

HeavyPistol_Unique_Bleed_05.name: Adept Disruptor Pistol
HeavyPistol_Unique_Bleed_05.description: This Unique heavy pistol borrows technology from the fast-firing disruptor submachine gun, while adding a charging mechanism to fire shield-destabilizing darts.

HeavyPistol_Unique_Bleed_04.name: House Disruptor Pistol
HeavyPistol_Unique_Bleed_04.description: This Unique heavy pistol borrows technology from the fast-firing disruptor submachine gun, while adding a charging mechanism to fire shield-destabilizing darts.

HeavyPistol_Unique_Bleed_03.name: Artisan Disruptor Pistol
HeavyPistol_Unique_Bleed_03.description: This Unique heavy pistol borrows technology from the fast-firing disruptor submachine gun, while adding a charging mechanism to fire shield-destabilizing darts.

HeavyAmmo.name: Heavy Darts
HeavyAmmo.description: For use in larger and more powerful weapons, Heavy Darts are standard ammunition and can pierce certain types of armor.

HarkHeavyPistol5.name: Regis Rafiq Snubnose
HarkHeavyPistol5.description: There is a Rafiq Snubnose Pistol in the cabinet by the bed of Count Daran of Ishkal. His wife is unaware and would disapprove.

HarkHeavyPistol4.name: Adept Rafiq Snubnose
HarkHeavyPistol4.description: There is a Rafiq Snubnose Pistol in the cabinet by the bed of Count Daran of Ishkal. His wife is unaware and would disapprove.

HarkHeavyPistol3.name: House Rafiq Snubnose

HarkAr2.name: Karpov 38
HarkAr2.description: The standard Great House assault rifle for more than a hundred years, the Karpov 38 shone due to its simple design and very low maintenance needs.

DewReaper_Unique_05.description: Crafted to the same general standards of other Dew Reapers, this particular design was modified by Thufir Hawat to ease the lives of the Atreides pyons. This Unique Dew Reaper siphons a portion of the Holtzman field that powers the collection of dew to lighten the Dew Reaper itself, allowing an easier swing, lighter load and more efficiency in the long run.

ChoamSda3.name: Standard Maula Pistol
ChoamSda3.description: Redesigned from the ground up, the MK ll is a must-have for successful underworld kingpins. Or so they are reputed to be. They've not been convicted of anything.

ChoamSda2.name: Maula Pistol
ChoamSda2.description: An improvement on its predecessor, the Maula Pistol MK l did not sell well at first owing to its high price relative to its improvements. The price was subsequently dropped and sales picked up.

ChoamSda1.name: Improvised Maula Pistol
ChoamSda1.description: Lightweight but with a short range, the Maula Pistol is a reliable sidearm.

ChoamLg2.name: Black Market K-28 Lasgun
ChoamLg2.description:
Though the Imperium has forbidden the import of lasguns without a safety mechanism, there are other alternatives for bringing a lasgun to Arrakis. The smugglers have access to an entire offworld arsenal of lasguns that do not include the safety mechanisms put in place by the Landsraad council.
Unfortunately, this Unique lasgun is not one of them. It's just a regular lasgun with the serial numbers filed off.

ChoamLg1.name: Arhun K-28 Lasgun
ChoamLg1.description:
When a lasgun contacted a hot shield in Carthag, it was a disaster. Thousands died in the ensuing nuclear blast and the city was leveled.

Due to the devastating loss of life and spice production capacity, all lasguns imported to Arrakis are now fitted with a safety mechanism that immediately shuts them off if they are targeting a Holtzman shield, including this Unique model.

ChoamCom2.name: Industrial Static Compactor
ChoamCom2.description: Once called the Particle Agglomerator, this device was renamed and remarketed under its new name at twice the price and far outsold the original.

ChoamCom1.name: Static Compactor
ChoamCom1.description: Point and shoot at flour sand or spice sand to compact it into a clump that can be picked up. Can be made from Fremen components. Depletes power from a Power Pack on use.

BodyFluidExtractor_Unique_Water_06.name: Filter Extractor Mk6
BodyFluidExtractor_Unique_Water_06.description: This Unique fluid extractor has been modified with a small filter that, upon use, can separate some pure water out of blood and divert it to the appropriate containers. Developed by slavers who did not wish to risk disease but considered their cargo a portable source of water.

BodyFluidExtractor_Unique_Water_05.description: This Unique fluid extractor has been modified with a small filter that, upon use, can separate some pure water out of blood and divert it to the appropriate containers. BodyFluidExtractor_Unique_Poison_06.name: Impure Extractor Mk6
BodyFluidExtractor_Unique_Poison_06.description: This Unique exsanguination tool liquefies internals of the target, allowing the wielder to extract even more fluids. In addition, any excess fluid is converted to a poison which is applied to the user's weaponry.

BodyFluidExtractor_Unique_Poison_05.name: Impure Extractor Mk5
BodyFluidExtractor_Unique_Poison_05.description: This Unique exsanguination tool liquefies internals of the target, allowing the wielder to extract even more fluids. In addition, any excess fluid is converted to a poison which is applied to the user's weaponry.

BodyFluidExtractor_2h_tier6.name: Blood Extractor Mk6
BodyFluidExtractor_2h_tier6.description: Equip and use this to extract blood from dead bodies into a Blood Sack. Blood can be processed into water with a Blood Purifier in your base.

BodyFluidExtractor_03.name: Blood Extractor Mk4
BodyFluidExtractor_03.description: Equip and use this to extract blood from dead bodies into a Blood Sack. Blood can be processed into water with a Blood Purifier in your base.

BodyFluidExtractor_02.name: Blood Extractor Mk2
BodyFluidExtractor_02.description: Equip and use this to extract blood from dead bodies into a Blood Sack. Blood can be processed into water with a Blood Purifier in your base.

BodyFluidExtractor.name: Improvised Blood Extractor
BodyFluidExtractor.description: A crude device for extracting blood from corpses and into a Blood Sack. Blood can be processed into water with a Blood Purifier at a base. It is rumored that the Fremen have perfected a field version of this device.

Binoculars_1.name: Binoculars
Binoculars_1.description: Used to view and mark objects at a far distance. The binoculars are linked to the paracompass, thus allowing markers placed using the binoculars to be pinpointed using the compass.

AtreSmg6.name: Regis Disruptor M11
AtreSmg6.description: As the Holtzman Effect is impervious to fast moving ballistics, Disruptors instead fire darts of variable velocities in order to find penetration points on the shield. Once inside a Holtzman Shield they trigger a static pulse that impacts the power flow to the shield. If enough disruptor darts penetrate, a shield can be taken offline. A Great House item.

AtreLMG5.description: A light machine gun that sports a large capacity magazine and a high fire rate. Used for crowd control against multiple opponents.

AtreLMG4.description: A light machine gun that sports a large capacity magazine and a high fire rate. Used for crowd control against multiple opponents.

Ammo.name: Light Darts
Ammo.description: When Holtzman shields were introduced the use of lasguns became too dangerous and subsequently, the use of dart projectiles became the standard ammunition of House Troops and other military forces.

StaticCompactor_CR.name: Static Compactor
StaticCompactor_CR.description: Point and shoot at flour sand or spice sand to compact it into a clump that can be picked up. Can be made from Fremen components. Depletes power from a Power Pack on use.

Hook_01.name: The Glutton's Hook
Hook_01.description: A Special sharpened hook that's been used on all manner of meats. Adds bleed stacks to its target on hit.

UniqueSda_Story_Ari.name: Ari's Pistol
UniqueSda_Story_Ari.description: A special Maula Pistol that greatly increases accuracy while Prescient.

UniqueDirk_Story_Feyd.name: Feyd's Take-Down Blade
UniqueDirk_Story_Feyd.description: A Special assassination blade that quickly poisons its target.

Crysknife_Story_Zantara.name: Zantara's Crysknife
Crysknife_Story_Zantara.description: A Special crysknife that used to belong to Zantara.

Crysknife.name: Unfixed Crysknife
Crysknife.description: The Unfixed Crysknife is made from a sandworm's tooth and is very brittle. Cannot leave the owner's person.

DewReaper_Unique_Story.name: Water Shipper's Dew Reaper
DewReaper_Unique_Story.description: A Special dew reaper with increased yield, adapted to large scale farming operations.

Shotgun_Unique_LargeMag_06.name: Ambition
Shotgun_Unique_LargeMag_06.description: A {Unique} shotgun with an ambitious design that holds two slugs in each barrel to limit the downsides of these types of weapons.

Ghola_NPC_Knife_01.name: Ghola Scrap Knife 1
Ghola_NPC_Knife_01.description: Ghola Scrap Knife Temp long desc

Ghola_NPC_Knife_02.name: Ghola Scrap Knife 2
Ghola_NPC_Knife_02.description: Ghola Scrap Knife Temp long desc

Ghola_NPC_Knife_03.name: Ghola Scrap Knife 3
Ghola_NPC_Knife_03.description: Ghola Scrap Knife Temp long desc

NPE_ScrapMetalKnife.name: Scrap Metal Knife
NPE_ScrapMetalKnife.description: Designed by necessity using whatever is close at hand, many resort to this melee weapon for short-range Blade Damage.

Unique_Sword_BleedyBlocky_4.name: Sword of Seven Sorrows
Unique_Sword_BleedyBlocky_4.description: This beautiful Unique sword is fashioned from shock-absorbing materials that reduce the strain of blocks and parries. It also includes a cluster of integrated plasteel shards - the seven sorrows - near the hilt that can wound the blade hand of an attacker upon a successful block.

Unique_Sword_BleedyBlocky_5.name: Bite Back Blade
Unique_Sword_BleedyBlocky_5.description: This Unique sword is fashioned from shock-absorbing materials that reduce the strain of blocks and parries. It also includes a cluster of integrated plasteel shards near the hilt that can wound the blade hand of an attacker upon a successful block.

Unique_Sword_BleedyBlocky_6.name: Spike Hilt Sword
Unique_Sword_BleedyBlocky_6.description: This Unique sword is fashioned from shock-absorbing materials that reduce the strain of blocks and parries. It also includes a cluster of integrated plasteel shards near the hilt that can wound the blade hand of an attacker upon a successful block.

Fireballer_2.name: Duraluminum Pyrocket
Fireballer_2.description: The weapon’s designer had a known sadistic streak. This Unique customized flamethrower fires condensed balls of ignited incendiary gel. On impact, fireballs detonate, dealing damage in a large radius. The splashing gel clings to flesh, searing and bubbling skin and fat with intense heat.

Fireballer_3.name: Plastanium Pyrocket
Fireballer_3.description: The weapon’s designer had a known sadistic streak. This Unique customized flamethrower fires condensed balls of ignited incendiary gel. On impact, fireballs detonate, dealing damage in a large radius. The splashing gel clings to flesh, searing and bubbling skin and fat with intense heat.

RocketLauncher_3.name: Adept Missile Launcher
RocketLauncher_3.description: A launcher that fires homing rockets.

UniqueAr6_Electric.name: Experimental Lightning Gun
UniqueAr6_Electric.description: An old Planetologist wisdom says: “The freaks of cyclonic storms are the rules of cyclonic storms.” In their hubris to harness the Coriolis storm, a team of scientists lost their lives in an Imperial Testing Station. This Unique rifle, a byproduct of those experiments, uses electrical power rather than standard ammunition. The EMP blasts disrupt shields.

DualBlades_1.name: Adept Dual Blades
DualBlades_1.description:
Holding down the attack button initiates a sequence of frenzied hits that partially bypass shields.

The slightly curved, double-edged Kindjal and the smaller Slip-tip knife form a marriage of razor-sharp mayhem. A dual-wielding fighting style has formed around these two weapons. Often, the frightful Kindjal draws the eye while the Slip-tip sneaks into one’s vitals.

DualBlades_2.name: Regis Dual Blades
DualBlades_2.description:
Holding down the attack button initiates a sequence of frenzied hits that partially bypass shields.

The slightly curved, double-edged Kindjal and the smaller Slip-tip knife form a marriage of razor-sharp mayhem. A dual-wielding fighting style has formed around these two weapons. Often, the frightful Kindjal draws the eye while the Slip-tip sneaks into one’s vitals.

Minotaur_Memento.name: Asterion’s End
Minotaur_Memento.description:
A dense, razor-edged Unique weapon built to shear through armored flesh by force alone.

Tauromachy, the brutal Old Terran contest of man against beast, endured as a defining Atreides rite until Old Duke Paulus fell beneath Salusan horns. Asterion’s End lingers as a ghost of the arena, whispered as though the Minotaur’s curse still coils within it, binding valor and doom in equal measure.

DualBlades_Memento.name: Feyd’s Spare Blades
DualBlades_Memento.description: Feyd-Rautha is known to favor his own custom sets of Kindjal and Slip-tip dual blades, making deadly use of their combination. It would be a rare privileged to own such a set. How many lives have these razor edges claimed?

UniqueDualBlades_6.name: Burning Blades
UniqueDualBlades_6.description: Designed by Masano of the Sandflies, these unique, heated blades both tear and scorch flesh, leaving a screaming impression.

B1C4_Unique_HarkAr2.name: The Angry Adder
B1C4_Unique_HarkAr2.description: Sometimes, even a minor wound can kill. This Unique rifle is modified to do poison damage.

B1C4_Unique_LMG2.name: The Hateful Barker
B1C4_Unique_LMG2.description: Peak aggression is often the enemy of precision. This Unique LMG is very inaccurate but makes up for it with a 25% damage bonus.

B1C4_Unique_SmugDmr1.name: Blind Fury
B1C4_Unique_SmugDmr1.description: Necessity is the mother of modification. This Unique rifle sacrifices its scope for slightly faster reload, slightly faster rate of fire, and holds 5 ammo.

SardaukarSword_1.name: XX_Sardaukar Blade
SardaukarSword_1.description: XX_Long blade used by elite Sardaukar forces.

B1C4_Unique_Dirk2.name: Eel’s Tooth
B1C4_Unique_Dirk2.description: The best offense is a fully-charged battery. Every attack from this Unique blade restores one’s battery pack by 5.

B1C4_Unique_DualBlades1.name: Leech’s Maw
B1C4_Unique_DualBlades1.description: A drained enemy is a helpless enemy. Every hit from these Unique dual blades drains a target of power.

B1C4_Unique_Kindjal2.name: Serpent’s Fang
B1C4_Unique_Kindjal2.description: Intrigue amongst the Great Houses is a treacherous game. Poison often coats the blades of polite society. This Unique Kindjal causes poison damage.

B1C4_Unique_Sword2.name: Branding Blade
B1C4_Unique_Sword2.description: A special chemical treatment super heats the blade. Enemies who live tend to carry the scars with them forever after. This Unique sword causes burn buildup with every hit.

B1C4_Unique_HeavyPistol2.name: Hell-Fury Pistol
B1C4_Unique_HeavyPistol2.description: A special cocktail of magnesium and certain other elements can produce a very nasty, burning round. This Unique snub-nosed heavy pistol causes fire-buildup on a hit.

B1C4_Unique_Rapier2.name: Prescient Edge
B1C4_Unique_Rapier2.description: The edge of this blade is so sharp, its balance so precise, the wielder feels as if they know their opponent’s next move before they do. No attacker comes away unscathed. This Unique rapier causes bleed on an opponent with every successful parry.

B1C4_Unique_SMG2.name: Spitting Cobra
B1C4_Unique_SMG2.description: If at first your poison fails to slay — inundate, inundate, inundate. This Unique, assassin-modified disruptor causes poison buildup with every hit.

PowerPack_Unique_Capacity_06.name: Accelerator Power Pack
PowerPack_Unique_Capacity_06.description: An Imperial Testing Station full of radiation and corpses sits in the Deep Desert. It is said the parts of lost House atomics were used to create other devices. This Unique power pack is charged by a nuclear accelerator, offering a higher than normal durability for those brave enough to use it.

PowerPack.name: Improvised Power Pack
PowerPack.description: Essential item that allows the user to operate equipment that requires power. When all power is depleted, stop the current activity to allow the battery to recharge.

PowerPack2.name: Power Pack Mk2
PowerPack2.description: An improved power pack. This more advanced version has a larger power capacity and regenerates power faster.

PowerPack3.name: Power Pack Mk4
PowerPack3.description: A power pack with a very large capacity, made for the use of industrial tools and equipment.

PowerPack4.name: Power Pack Mk6
PowerPack4.description: The first generation of power packs were quite unstable and had a unfortunate habit of blowing its user to smithereens. The design has since been improved to ensure this happens quite rarely now.

PowerPack5.name: Power Pack Mk1
PowerPack5.description: Essential item that allows the user to operate equipment that requires power. When all power is depleted, stop the current activity to allow the battery to recharge.

PowerPack6.name: Power Pack Mk3
PowerPack6.description: Essential item that allows the user to operate equipment that requires power. When all power is depleted, stop the current activity to allow the battery to recharge.

PowerPack7.name: Power Pack Mk5
PowerPack7.description: Essential item that allows the user to operate equipment that requires power. When all power is depleted, stop the current activity to allow the battery to recharge.

PowerPack_Unique_PoisRadMitigation_06.name: Purifier Power Pack
PowerPack_Unique_PoisRadMitigation_06.description: This {Unique} power pack creates an electromagnetic field around the wearer that protects against radiation and toxins.

FullStabilizationBelt_Unique_DmgReductio.name: Sentinel Belt
FullStabilizationBelt_Unique_DmgReductio.description: This {Unique} stabilization suspensor belt enables the wearer to rapidly adjust movements to avoid incoming hits while suspended.

PowerPack_Unique_Regen_01.name: Old Sparky Mk1
PowerPack_Unique_Regen_01.description: Sim found that if he crossed the wires in his power pack just so, he could create a Unique power pack that recharged quickly - but with a slightly reduced power pool. Sim's power pack became known as 'old sparky' for it's constant discharge of electrical sparks - but his technique was copied widely by those who value speed over duration.

PowerPack_Unique_Regen_02.name: Old Sparky Mk2
PowerPack_Unique_Regen_02.description: Sim found that if he crossed the wires in his power pack just so, he could create a Unique power pack that recharged quickly - but with a slightly reduced power pool. PowerPack_Unique_Regen_04.name: Old Sparky Mk4
PowerPack_Unique_Regen_04.description: Sim found that if he crossed the wires in his power pack just so, he could create a Unique power pack that recharged quickly - but with a slightly reduced power pool. Sim's power pack became known as 'old sparky' for its constant discharge of electrical sparks - but his technique was copied widely by those who value speed over duration.

HoltzmanShieldActiveDrain.name: Holtzman Shield Mk2
HoltzmanShieldActiveDrain.description:
An Old Imperial personal shielding device that can be manually toggled on and off to deflect incoming darts and blades at the cost of power from a Power Pack. However, the slow blade penetrates the shield and melee combatants will take advantage of this.

The shield also prevents objects from exiting, thus it will automatically deactivate when firing darts or throwing objects. It will then automatically reactivate according to its refresh time. While active, the shield generates sounds and vibrations that drive sandworms mad. Usage on open sands is not recommended.

HoltzmanShieldActiveDrain_Story_Paranoid.description: A Special Holtzman Shield with increased durability, obtained from defeating the Paranoid assassination target.

GlidePartialStabilizationBelt.name: The Emperor's Wings Mk1
GlidePartialStabilizationBelt.description: A prop from the famous play 'My Father's Shadow', this Unique suspensor belt is used by Jongleurs for short, but effective bursts of floating during performances. Jump twice to activate and float upwards. Suspensor fields are notorious for preserving momentum, and they deplete power as long as they are kept activated.
