SuspensorBelt.name: Leap Suspensor Belt
SuspensorBelt.description: Reduces gravity's pull on the user, allowing for extended height and distance when jumping. Old Imperial origin. Depletes power from a power pack on use.

FullSuspensorBelt.name: Full Suspensor Belt
FullSuspensorBelt.description: Removes gravity's influence on the user while active, allowing for extending traversal in any vertical direction. Depletes power from a Power Pack when in use. Old Imperial origin.

PartialStabilizationBelt.name: Planar Suspensor Belt
PartialStabilizationBelt.description: Stabilizes the user's vertical position and allows them to reposition horizontally. Sluggish repositioning but low power depletion for extended use.

FullStabilizationBelt.name: Responsive Planar Suspensor Belt
FullStabilizationBelt.description: Stabilizes the user's vertical position and allows them to reposition horizontally. Responsive repositioning but high power depletion, generally used for advanced combat maneuvers.

t2tsp.name: Passive Suspensor Belt
t2tsp.description: Protects user from taking damage from falling. Automatically kicks on at damaging speeds and will persist as long as the user has power. Old Imperial origin.

FullSuspensorBelt_Unique_Durability.name: Elohim-Class Suspensor Belt
FullSuspensorBelt_Unique_Durability.description:
This item has additional durability.

It is said Baron Harkonnen floats into a room with the grotesque majesty of a glutinous god. He owes much of that awe to his superior suspensor belt. This Unique model likewise bears the markings and fine materials designating it as a custom creation that belonged to, or was meant for, someone of high nobility.

ContractSeronVarlinDamasteelSword.name: Ceremonial Damasteel Sword
ContractSeronVarlinDamasteelSword.description: Forged to Seron's specifications, it seems more a piece of art than a blade.

Oil.name: Fuel Cell
Oil.description: Found throughout the world, fuel cells can generate power for bases directly when loaded into a Fuel Generator. They can be refined at a Chemical Refinery into Vehicle Fuel Cells to power vehicles.

T6_Augment_Acuracy1.name: Precision Barrel Adjuster
T6_Augment_Acuracy1.description: An augmentation which increases the accuracy of any ranged weapon.

T6_Augment_Armor1.name: Concussive Dampening
T6_Augment_Armor1.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces concussive damage taken, but increases energy damage taken.

T6_Augment_Armor10.name: Energy Resistant Weave
T6_Augment_Armor10.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces energy damage taken, but increases poison damage taken.

T6_Augment_Armor11.name: Detoxifying Fabrics
T6_Augment_Armor11.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces poison damage taken, but increases energy damage taken.

T6_Augment_Armor12.name: Dart-proof Latticing
T6_Augment_Armor12.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces dart damage taken, but increases overall volume.

T6_Augment_Armor13.name: Flame-resistant Fabrics
T6_Augment_Armor13.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces fire damage taken, but increases poison damage taken.

T6_Augment_Armor14.name: Blade-warding Weave
T6_Augment_Armor14.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces blade damage taken, but increases dart damage taken.

T6_Augment_Armor16.name: Radiation Absorbing Fabrics
T6_Augment_Armor16.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces radiation build up and fire damage taken, but increases blade and dart damage taken. This augmentation cannot be applied to Radiation Suits.

T6_Augment_Armor17.name: Radiation Shielded Latticing
T6_Augment_Armor17.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces radiation build up, but increases overall volume.

T6_Augment_Armor2.name: Concussive Redirection
T6_Augment_Armor2.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces concussive damage taken, but increases dart damage taken.

T6_Augment_Armor4.name: Penetrative Reinforcement
T6_Augment_Armor4.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces dart damage taken, but increases blade damage taken.

T6_Augment_Armor5.name: Energy Dispersing Padding
T6_Augment_Armor5.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces energy damage taken, but increases concussive damage taken.

T6_Augment_Armor6.name: Garment Reinforcement
T6_Augment_Armor6.description: An augmentation for garments which increases armor value.

T6_Augment_Armor8.name: Desert-tested Weave
T6_Augment_Armor8.description: An augmentation for garments which increases heat protection, but increases overall volume.

T6_Augment_Armor9.name: Curative-infused Padding
T6_Augment_Armor9.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces poison damage taken, but increases fire damage taken.

T6_Augment_BR1.name: Karpov 38 Pressurizer
T6_Augment_BR1.description: This Karpov 38-specific augmentation delays the release of fired darts in order to build up additional force, thus reducing the fire rate while increasing the damage output and accuracy.

T6_Augment_BR2.name: Karpov 38 Dart Sprayer
T6_Augment_BR2.description: A Karpov 38-specific augmentation that opts for less power behind each dart in order to fire more darts. This reduces the overall damage of each dart fired but increases the fire rate.

T6_Augment_BR3.name: Karpov 38 Heavy Kit
T6_Augment_BR3.description: This Karpov 38-specific augmentation alters the magazine to hold more powerful darts but fewer of them, thus reducing the weapon's overall volume and magazine capacity while improving damage output.

T6_Augment_BR4.name: Karpov 38 Focuser
T6_Augment_BR4.description: A Karpov 38-specific augmentation which improves accuracy and reload times and reduces recoil, but the overall damage output is reduced.

T6_Augment_BR8.name: Karpov 38 Precision Kit
T6_Augment_BR8.description: A Karpov 38-specific augmentation which focuses more on dealing critical damage to weak spots en-masse, thus increasing magazine capacity, headshot damage, and overall volume while reducing accuracy.

T6_Augment_Damage1.name: Heavy Caliber Upgrade
T6_Augment_Damage1.description: An augmentation which increases the damage output of any ranged weapon.

T6_Augment_DeathDurabilityOff.name: Protective Coating
T6_Augment_DeathDurabilityOff.description: An augmentation which removes the durability loss incurred when suffering defeat.

T6_Augment_Fireballer1.name: Pyrocket Supercharger
T6_Augment_Fireballer1.description: A Pyrocket-specific augmentation that increases damage output and fire rate, but at the cost of reload time and increased volume.

T6_Augment_Fireballer2.name: Pyrocket Quickloader
T6_Augment_Fireballer2.description: This Pyrocket-specific augmentation increases ammo capacity, reduces reload times and reduces overall volume, albeit at the cost of reduced accuracy and damage to shields.

T6_Augment_Flamethrower1.name: Flamethrower Amplifier
T6_Augment_Flamethrower1.description: A flamethrower-specific augmentation that increases damage output and reduces recoil, but increases overall volume.

T6_Augment_Flamethrower2.name: Flamethrower Superheater
T6_Augment_Flamethrower2.description: A flamethrower-specific augmentation that sprays out flames faster and causes more painful burns, but reduces the effective range.

T6_Augment_Flamethrower3.name: Flamethrower Nozzle Extension
T6_Augment_Flamethrower3.description: A flamethrower-specific augmentation that increases the effective range and ammo capacity at the cost of increased volume and recoil.

T6_Augment_Flamethrower4.name: Flamethrower Quickloader
T6_Augment_Flamethrower4.description: A flamethrower-specific augmentation that reduces recoil, reload time, and overall volume at the cost of damage output.

T6_Augment_Headshotdamage1.name: Tactical Enhancer
T6_Augment_Headshotdamage1.description: An augmentation which increases the headshot damage of any ranged weapon.

T6_Augment_HeavyPistol1.name: Rafiq Snubnose Heavy Kit
T6_Augment_HeavyPistol1.description: An augmentation for the Rafiq Snubnose heavy pistol which focuses on improving the stopping power of the gun, but makes it harder to handle.  This increases the damage and headshot damage of the gun at the cost of reducing the fire rate.

T6_Augment_HeavyPistol2.name: Rafiq Snubnose Disruptive Coating
T6_Augment_HeavyPistol2.description: This Rafiq Snubnose-specific augmentation improves the stopping power and shield disruption effect of the pistol while reducing overall volume, but at the cost of ammo capacity and reload time.

T6_Augment_HeavyPistol3.name: Rafiq Snubnose Quickdraw Assembly
T6_Augment_HeavyPistol3.description: An augmentation for the Rafiq Snubnose which reduces recoil and reload time and improves accuracy but reduces overall stopping power.

T6_Augment_HeavyPistol4.name: Rafiq Snubnose Expander
T6_Augment_HeavyPistol4.description: This Rafiq Snubnose-specific augmentation increases the ammo capacity of the pistol at the cost of recoil and increased overall volume.

T6_Augment_HeavyPistol5.name: Rafiq Snubnose Sprayer
T6_Augment_HeavyPistol5.description: An augmentation for the Rafiq Snubnose which increases the weapon's fire rate at the cost of shield damage.

T6_Augment_Lasgun1.name: Lasgun Focuser
T6_Augment_Lasgun1.description: A Lasgun-specific augmentation which increases the beam's damaging power and reduces overall volume, however the power drain and recoil suffer.

T6_Augment_Lasgun2.name: Lasgun Extender
T6_Augment_Lasgun2.description: This Lasgun-specific augmentation increases the range and accuracy of the beam and reduces overall volume, but reduces overall damage output.

T6_Augment_Lasgun3.name: Lasgun Harmonizer
T6_Augment_Lasgun3.description: An augmentation for Lasguns which increases the rate of fire of the beam, reduces recoil, and reduces power drain, however the range of the beam and its damage output are reduced, and overall volume is increased.

T6_Augment_Lasgun4.name: Lasgun Amplifier
T6_Augment_Lasgun4.description: A Lasgun-specific augmentation which increases damage output and reduces overall volume, but reduces range and increases recoil.

T6_Augment_Lmg1.name: VULCAN GAU-92 Expander
T6_Augment_Lmg1.description: A VULCAN GAU-92-specific augmentation which increases ammo capacity and improves reload times at the cost of accuracy, damage output, and overall volume.

T6_Augment_Lmg4.name: VULCAN GAU-92 Focuser
T6_Augment_Lmg4.description: An augmentation for the VULCAN GAU-92 which increases range and accuracy and reduces recoil, however rate of fire is reduced.

T6_Augment_Lmg5.name: VULCAN GAU-92 Disruptive Coating
T6_Augment_Lmg5.description: This VULCAN GAU-92-specific augmentation increases shield damage output and overall damage output, but reduces accuracy and increases recoil and reload times.

T6_Augment_Lmg6.name: VULCAN GAU-92 Sprayer
T6_Augment_Lmg6.description: A VULCAN GAU-92-specific augmentation which increases rate of fire, but reduces effective range and accuracy.

T6_Augment_Magazinecapacity1.name: Capacity Expander
T6_Augment_Magazinecapacity1.description: An augmentation which increases the ammo capacity of any ranged weapon, but increases overall volume.

T6_Augment_MaulaPistol1.name: Maula Pistol Sprayer
T6_Augment_MaulaPistol1.description: A Maula Pistol-specific augmentation which increases fire rate but reduces headshot damage.

T6_Augment_MaulaPistol2.name: Maula Pistol Disruptive Coating
T6_Augment_MaulaPistol2.description: This Maula Pistol-specific augmentation increases damage and shield damage and reduces overall volume, but reduces ammo capacity.

T6_Augment_MaulaPistol3.name: Maula Pistol Expander
T6_Augment_MaulaPistol3.description: A Maula Pistol-specific augmentation that expands ammo capacity and increases fire rate, but reduces accuracy and overall damage.

T6_Augment_MaulaPistol4.name: Maula Pistol Barrel Extender
T6_Augment_MaulaPistol4.description: An augmentation for Maula Pistols that increases effective range and accuracy and reduces reload times, but reduces overall rate of fire.

T6_Augment_MaulaPistol5.name: Maula Pistol Tactical Enhancer
T6_Augment_MaulaPistol5.description: A Maula Pistol-specific augmentation that reduces recoil and overall volume while also increasing accuracy and headshot damage. However, rate of fire and ammo capacity are reduced.

T6_Augment_Melee1.name: Blade Sharpener
T6_Augment_Melee1.description: An augmentation which increases the damage output of any melee weapon.

T6_Augment_Melee2.name: Blade Grip Adjuster
T6_Augment_Melee2.description: An augmentation which reduces the stamina cost to attack of any melee weapon.

T6_Augment_Melee3.name: Blade Flexi-Coating
T6_Augment_Melee3.description: An augmentation which reduces the stamina cost to block of any melee weapon.

T6_Augment_Melee4.name: Aggressive Grip Adjuster
T6_Augment_Melee4.description: A melee weapon augmentation which reduces the stamina cost to attack, but increases the stamina cost to block.

T6_Augment_Melee5.name: Lightweight Adjuster
T6_Augment_Melee5.description: A melee weapon augmentation which reduces the stamina cost to attack and overall volume, but reduces damage output.

T6_Augment_Melee6.name: Heavy Blade Adjuster
T6_Augment_Melee6.description: A melee weapon augmentation which increases damage, but increases stamina cost to block.

T6_Augment_Melee7.name: Defensive Grip Adjuster
T6_Augment_Melee7.description: A melee weapon augmentation which reduces the stamina cost to block, but increases the stamina cost to attack.

T6_Augment_Melee8.name: Blade Optimizer
T6_Augment_Melee8.description: A melee weapon augmentation which reduces the stamina cost to block and attack, but reduces damage.

T6_Augment_Melee9.name: Edge Optimizer
T6_Augment_Melee9.description: A melee weapon augmentation which increases damage, but increases stamina cost to attack.

T6_Augment_Range1.name: Barrel Extender
T6_Augment_Range1.description: An augmentation which increases the effective range of any ranged weapon.

T6_Augment_Rateoffire1.name: Quick-release Trigger
T6_Augment_Rateoffire1.description: An augmentation which increases the rate of fire of any ranged weapon.

T6_Augment_Recoil1.name: Recoil Adjuster
T6_Augment_Recoil1.description: An augmentation which reduces the recoil of any ranged weapon.

T6_Augment_ReloadSpeed1.name: Quickloader
T6_Augment_ReloadSpeed1.description: An augmentation which reduces the reload time of any ranged weapon.

T6_Augment_RocketLauncher1.name: Missile Launcher Fragmenter
T6_Augment_RocketLauncher1.description: An augmentation for Missile Launchers which increases area of effect and reduces reload times, but reduces shield damage.

T6_Augment_RocketLauncher2.name: Missile Launcher Disruptive Coating
T6_Augment_RocketLauncher2.description: A Missile Launcher-specific augmentation which increases shield damage, but increases reload times.

T6_Augment_RocketLauncher3.name: Missile Launcher Quickloader
T6_Augment_RocketLauncher3.description: A Missile Launcher-specific augmentation which reduces reload times and recoil and increases accuracy, but reduces overall damage.

T6_Augment_RocketLauncher4.name: Missile Launcher Heavy Payload
T6_Augment_RocketLauncher4.description: An augmentation for Missile Launchers which increases their damage output, but reduces shield damage and area of effect.

T6_Augment_Scattergun2.name: GRDA 44 Tactical Amplifier
T6_Augment_Scattergun2.description: A GRDA 44-specific augmentation which increases headshot damage, but reduces fire rate.

T6_Augment_Scattergun4.name: GRDA 44 Expander
T6_Augment_Scattergun4.description: An augmentation for the GRDA 44 which increases ammo capacity and effective range, but increases shot spread and reduces damage output.

T6_Augment_Scattergun5.name: GRDA 44 Amplifier
T6_Augment_Scattergun5.description: A GRDA 44-specific augmentation which increases damage output and reduces shot spread, but reduces effective range.

T6_Augment_Scattergun6.name: GRDA 44 Optimizer
T6_Augment_Scattergun6.description: An augmentation for the GRDA 44 which increases damage output, reduces shot spread and overall volume, but at the cost of ammo capacity.

T6_Augment_Scattergun7.name: GRDA 44 Sprayer
T6_Augment_Scattergun7.description: A GRDA 44-specific augmentation which increases rate of fire, but reduces accuracy and increases recoil and shot spread.

T6_Augment_Scattergun8.name: GRDA 44 Micro-Rigidity Coating
T6_Augment_Scattergun8.description: An augmentation for the GRDA 44 which increases effective range and accuracy, and reduces recoil and overall volume, but reduces ammo capacity.

T6_Augment_Shielddamage1.name: Disruptive Coating
T6_Augment_Shielddamage1.description: An augmentation which increases the shield damage of any ranged weapon.

T6_Augment_Shotgun1.name: Drillshot FK7 Tactical Adjuster
T6_Augment_Shotgun1.description: A Drillshot FK7-specific augmentation which increases headshot damage, accuracy, and effective range, but reduces rate of fire.

T6_Augment_Shotgun2.name: Drillshot FK7 Amplifier
T6_Augment_Shotgun2.description: An augmentation for the Drillshot FK7 which increases damage and reduces overall volume, but reduces ammo capacity.

T6_Augment_Shotgun3.name: Drillshot FK7 Optimizer
T6_Augment_Shotgun3.description: A Drillshot FK7-specific augmentation which increases damage and reduces recoil, but reduces accuracy.

T6_Augment_Shotgun4.name: Drillshot FK7 Sprayer
T6_Augment_Shotgun4.description: An augmentation for the Drillshot FK7 which increases rate of fire and ammo capacity, but reduces damage output and increases recoil and overall volume.

T6_Augment_Shotgun5.name: Drillshot FK7 Quickloader
T6_Augment_Shotgun5.description: A Drillshot FK7-specific augmentation that reduces reload times, improves headshot damage, and reduces overall volume, but reduces accuracy and ammo capacity and increases recoil.

T6_Augment_smg1.name: Disruptor M11 Precision Tuning
T6_Augment_smg1.description: A Disruptor-specific augmentation which increases ammo capacity and accuracy, and reduces recoil, but reduces damage output.

T6_Augment_smg2.name: Disruptor M11 Quickloader
T6_Augment_smg2.description: An augmentation for the Disruptor M11 which reduces reload times and increases rate of fire, but reduces damage output and accuracy, and increases overall volume.

T6_Augment_smg3.name: Disruptor M11 Shield Breaker
T6_Augment_smg3.description: A Disruptor-specific augmentation which increases shield damage and effective range, but reduces rate of fire.

T6_Augment_smg4.name: Disruptor M11 Sprayer
T6_Augment_smg4.description: An augmentation for the Disruptor M11 which increases ammo capacity and rate of fire, but increases reload times and overall volume.

T6_Augment_Smg5.name: Disruptor M11 Amplifier
T6_Augment_Smg5.description: A Disruptor-specific augmentation which increases damage output, but reduces rate of fire.

T6_Augment_smg7.name: Disruptor M11 Heavy Kit
T6_Augment_smg7.description: An augmentation for the Disruptor M11 which increases damage and reduces overall volume, but reduces accuracy and ammo capacity.

T6_Augment_Spitdartrifle2.name: JABAL Spitdart Tactical Enhancer
T6_Augment_Spitdartrifle2.description: An augmentation for the JABAL Spitdart Rifle which increases headshot damage, but increases recoil.

T6_Augment_Spitdartrifle3.name: JABAL Spitdart Range Adjuster
T6_Augment_Spitdartrifle3.description: A JABAL Spitdart Rifle-specific augmentation which increases accuracy and range, but increases reload times.

T6_Augment_SpitdartRifle5.name: JABAL Spitdart Amplifier
T6_Augment_SpitdartRifle5.description: An augmentation for the JABAL Spitdart Rifle which increases damage, but increases recoil.

T6_Augment_SpitdartRifle6.name: JABAL Spitdart Disruptive Coating
T6_Augment_SpitdartRifle6.description: A JABAL Spitdart Rifle-specific augmentation which increases shield damage, but reduces ammo capacity.

T6_Augment_SpitdartRifle7.name: JABAL Spitdart Expander
T6_Augment_SpitdartRifle7.description: An augmentation for JABAL Spitdart Rifles which increases ammo capacity and rate of fire, but reduces effective range, accuracy, and damage output and increases overall volume.

T6_Augment_SpitdartRifle8.name: JABAL Spitdart Toxicity Amplifier
T6_Augment_SpitdartRifle8.description: A JABAL Spitdart Rifle-specific augmentation which increases poison damage dealt, but reduces shield damage dealt.

T6_Augment_Armor3.name: Woven Reinforcement
T6_Augment_Armor3.description: An augmentation for garments which reduces blade damage taken, but increases poison and fire damage taken.

T6_Augment_Damage2.name: House Heavy Caliber Upgrade
T6_Augment_Damage2.description: An experimental augmentation provided by your Great House which increases the damage output of any ranged weapon.

T6_Augment_Ch5_BR1.name: Karpov 38 Sniper Barrel
T6_Augment_Ch5_BR1.description: A Karpov 38-specific augmentation which increases range and accuracy but reduces reload speed.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Fireballer1.name: Pyrocket Decimator
T6_Augment_Ch5_Fireballer1.description: A Pyrocket-specific augmentation which offers a massive bonus to shield damage but reduces magazine size and accuracy.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Flamethrower1.name: Flamethrower Decimator
T6_Augment_Ch5_Flamethrower1.description: A Flamethrower-specific augmentation which offers a massive bonus to shield damage but reduces the rate of fire.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Heavypistol1.name: Rafiq Snubnose Marksman
T6_Augment_Ch5_Heavypistol1.description: A Rafiq Snubnose-specific augmentation which grants a significant bonus to range and some added recoil control — but reduces magazine size.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Lasgun1.name: Lasgun Concentrator
T6_Augment_Ch5_Lasgun1.description: A Lasgun-specific augmentation which increases the beam’s damaging power and accuracy but reduces the rate of fire and magazine size.

T6_Augment_Ch5_LMG1.name: VULCAN GAU-92 Accelerator
T6_Augment_Ch5_LMG1.description: A VULCAN GAU-92-specific augmentation which increases accuracy, recoil control, and reload speed at the cost of its shield damaging capabilities.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Maulapistol1.name: Maula Pistol Antipersonnel Rounds
T6_Augment_Ch5_Maulapistol1.description: A Maula Pistol-specific augmentation which increases damage and critical damage at the cost of shield damage, range, and recoil.

T6_Augment_Ch5_RocketLauncher1.name: Missile Launcher Obliterator
T6_Augment_Ch5_RocketLauncher1.description: An augmentation for Missile Launchers which increases shield damage and recoil control, but reduces accuracy.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Scattergun1.name: Scattergun Rampage-Enhancement
T6_Augment_Ch5_Scattergun1.description: A Scattergun-specific augmentation which increases damage and magazine size, at the cost of critical hit damage.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Shotgun1.name: Drillshot FK7 Spray-and-Pray
T6_Augment_Ch5_Shotgun1.description: A Drillshot FK7-specific augmentation which increases reload speed and rate of fire, at the cost of range, recoil, and magazine size.

T6_Augment_Ch5_SMG1.name: Disruptor M11 Personnel-Buster
T6_Augment_Ch5_SMG1.description: A Disruptor M11-specific augmentation which increases critical damage and rate of fire, at the cost of shield damage, range, and recoil.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Spitdart1.name: JABAL Spitdart Ranger
T6_Augment_Ch5_Spitdart1.description: A JABAL Spitdart-specific augmentation which increases reload speed and range, at a cost to the rate of fire.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Melee1.name: Heavy Metal Blade Coating
T6_Augment_Ch5_Melee1.description: An augmentation which increases the damage output of any melee weapon while greatly increasing its weight.

T6_Augment_Ch5_Melee3.name: Blade Blood Grooves
T6_Augment_Ch5_Melee3.description: An augmentation, for any melee weapon, which reduces weight and stamina cost but reduces damage.
